          setIsInitializing(false);

  - ,

import { cva } from 
  - ;

  - ;

import { cn } from 
  - ;

function cloneSingleChild(
  children,
  props,
  key,
) {
  return Children.map(children, (child) => {
    // Checking isValidElement is the safe way and avoids a typescript error too.
    if (isValidElement(child) && Children.only(children)) {
      const childProps = child.props;
      if (childProps.className) {
        // make sure we retain classnames of both passed props and child
        props ??= {};
        props.className = cn(childProps.className, props.className);
        props.style = {
          ...(childProps.style),
          ...(props.style),
        };
      }
      return cloneElement(child, { ...props, key: key ? String(key) : undefined });
    }
    return child;
  });
}

export function AgentAudioVisualizerBar({
  size = 
  - ,

  - ,
  color,

  audioTrack,
  className,
  children,
  style,
  ...props
}) {

  - :
      case 
  - :

        return 5;

    bands: _barCount,
    loPass: 100,
    hiPass: 200,
  });

  - :
        return 2000 / _barCount;
      case 
  - :
        return 2000;
      case 
  - :
        return 500;
      case 
  - :
        return 150;
      default:
        return 1000;

    () => (state === 
  -  ? volumeBands : new Array(_barCount).fill(0)),
    [state, volumeBands, _barCount]
  );

    throw new Error(
  - );
  }

        color

  ...props
}) {

  - ;

  - ;

  -  });

              <MessageContent>

              </MessageContent>
            </Message>
          );

const MOTION_PROPS = {
  variants: {
    hidden: {
      height: 0,
      opacity: 0,
      marginBottom: 0,
    },
    visible: {
      height: 
  - ,
      opacity: 1,
      marginBottom: 12,
    },
  },
  initial: 
  - ,
  transition: {
    duration: 0.3,
    ease: 
  - ,

function AgentChatInput({
  chatOpen,
  onSend = async () => {},
  className
}) {
  const inputRef = useRef(null);
  const [isSending, setIsSending] = useState(false);
  const [message, setMessage] = useState(
  - );
  const isDisabled = isSending || message.trim().length === 0;

  const handleSend = async () => {
    if (isDisabled) {
      return;
    }

    try {
      setIsSending(true);
      await onSend(message.trim());
      setMessage(
  - );
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
    } finally {
      setIsSending(false);
    }
  };

  const handleKeyDown = async (e) => {
    if (e.key === 
  -  && !e.shiftKey) {
      e.preventDefault();
      handleSend();
    }
  };

  const handleButtonClick = async () => {
    if (isDisabled) return;
    await handleSend();
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    if (chatOpen) return;
    // when not disabled refocus on input
    inputRef.current?.focus();
  }, [chatOpen]);

  return (
    <div
      className={cn(
  - , className)}>
      <textarea
        autoFocus
        ref={inputRef}
        value={message}
        disabled={!chatOpen || isSending}
        placeholder=
  - 
        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
        onChange={(e) => setMessage(e.target.value)}
        className=
  -  />
      <Button
        size=
  - 
        type=
  - 
        disabled={isDisabled}
        variant={isDisabled ? 
  -  : 
  - }
        title={isSending ? 
  -  : 
  - }
        onClick={handleButtonClick}
        className=
  - >
        {isSending ? <Loader className=
  -  /> : <SendHorizontal />}
      </Button>
    </div>
  );
}

/**
 * A control bar specifically designed for voice assistant interfaces. Provides controls for
 * microphone, camera, screen share, chat, and disconnect. Includes an expandable chat input for
 * text-based interaction with the agent.
 *
 * @example
 *
 * ```tsx
 * <AgentControlBar
 *   variant=
  - 
 *   isConnected={true}
 *   onDisconnect={() => handleDisconnect()}
 *   controls={{
 *     microphone: true,
 *     camera: true,
 *     screenShare: false,
 *     chat: true,
 *     leave: true,
 *   }}
 * />;
 * ```
 *
 * @extends ComponentProps<
  - >
 */
export function AgentControlBar({
  variant = 
  - ,
  controls,
  isChatOpen = false,
  isConnected = false,
  saveUserChoices = true,
  onDisconnect,
  onDeviceError,
  onIsChatOpenChange,
  className,
  ...props
}) {

  const {
    microphoneTrack,
    cameraToggle,
    microphoneToggle,
    screenShareToggle,
    handleAudioDeviceChange,
    handleVideoDeviceChange,
    handleMicrophoneDeviceSelectError,
    handleCameraDeviceSelectError,
  } = useInputControls({ onDeviceError, saveUserChoices });

  const handleSendMessage = async (message) => {
    await send(message);
  };

  const visibleControls = {
    leave: controls?.leave ?? true,
    microphone: controls?.microphone ?? publishPermissions.microphone,
    screenShare: controls?.screenShare ?? publishPermissions.screenShare,
    camera: controls?.camera ?? publishPermissions.camera,
    chat: controls?.chat ?? publishPermissions.data,
  };

  const isEmpty = Object.values(visibleControls).every((value) => !value);

  if (isEmpty) {
    console.warn(
  - );
    return null;
  }

  return (
    <div
      aria-label=
  -

  - ,
        variant === 
  -  ? 
  -  : 
  - ,
        className
      )}
      {...props}>

  -  : 
  - }

  - >

          onSend={handleSendMessage}
          className={cn(variant === 
  -  && 
  - )} />
      </motion.div>

  - >

  - >

  - }

  -

              pressed={microphoneToggle.enabled}
              disabled={microphoneToggle.pending}

/**
 * A button to disconnect from the current agent session.
 * Calls the session
  - >
 *
 * @example
 * ```tsx
 * <AgentDisconnectButton onClick={() => console.log(
  - )} />
 * ```
 */
export function AgentDisconnectButton({
  icon,
  size = 
  - ,
  variant = 
  - ,
  children,
  onClick,
  ...props
}) {
  const room = useRoomContext();
  const handleClick = async (event) => {
    onClick?.(event);
    if (room?.disconnect) {
      await room.disconnect();
    }
  };

  return (
    <Button size={size} variant={variant} onClick={handleClick} {...props}>
      {icon ?? <PhoneOffIcon />}
      {children ?? <span className={cn(size?.includes(

/**
 * A select component for selecting a media device.
 *
 * @extends ComponentProps<
  - >
 *
 * @example
 * ```tsx
 * <TrackDeviceSelect
 *   size=
  - 
 *   variant=
  - 
 *   kind=
  - 
 *   track={micTrackRef}
 * />
 * ```
 */
function TrackDeviceSelect({
  kind,
  track,
  size = 
  - ,
  variant = 
  - ,
  className,
  requestPermissions = false,
  onMediaDeviceError,
  onDeviceListChange,
  onActiveDeviceChange,
  ...props
}) {
  const room = useMaybeRoomContext();
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  const [requestPermissionsState, setRequestPermissionsState] = useState(requestPermissions);
  const { devices, activeDeviceId, setActiveMediaDevice } = useMediaDeviceSelect({
    room,
    kind,
    track,
    requestPermissions: requestPermissionsState,
    onError: onMediaDeviceError,
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    onDeviceListChange?.(devices);
  }, [devices, onDeviceListChange]);

  const handleOpenChange = (open) => {
    setOpen(open);
    if (open) {
      setRequestPermissionsState(true);
    }
  };

  const handleActiveDeviceChange = (deviceId) => {
    setActiveMediaDevice(deviceId);
    onActiveDeviceChange?.(deviceId);
  };

  const filteredDevices = useMemo(() => devices.filter((d) => d.deviceId !== 
  - ), [devices]);

  if (filteredDevices.length < 2) {
    return null;
  }

  return (
    <Select
      open={open}
      value={activeDeviceId}
      onOpenChange={handleOpenChange}
      onValueChange={handleActiveDeviceChange}>
      <SelectTrigger className={cn(selectVariants({ size, variant }), className)} {...props}>
        {size !== 
  -  && (
          <SelectValue className=
  -  placeholder={`Select a ${kind}`} />
        )}
      </SelectTrigger>
      <SelectContent position=
  - >
        {filteredDevices.map((device) => (
          <SelectItem
            key={device.deviceId}
            value={device.deviceId}
            className=

import { cva } from 
  - ;
import { Track } from 
  - ;
import {
  MicIcon,
  MicOffIcon,
  MonitorUpIcon,
  MonitorOffIcon,
  LoaderIcon,
  VideoIcon,
  VideoOffIcon,
} from 
  - ;
import { Toggle } from 
  - ;
import { cn } from 
  - ;

export const agentTrackToggleVariants = cva([
  - ], {
  variants: {
    size: {
      default: 
  - ,
      sm: 
  - ,
      lg: 
  - ,
    },
    variant: {
      default: [
        
  - ,
        
  - ,
        
  - ,
        
  - ,
        
  - ,
      ],
      outline: [
        
  - ,
        
  - ,
        
  - ,
        
  - ,
        
  - ,
        
  - ,
      ],
    },
  },
  defaultVariants: {
    variant: 
  - ,
  },
});

function getSourceIcon(source, enabled, pending = false) {
  if (pending) {
    return LoaderIcon;
  }

  switch (source) {
    case Track.Source.Microphone:
      return enabled ? MicIcon : MicOffIcon;
    case Track.Source.Camera:
      return enabled ? VideoIcon : VideoOffIcon;
    case Track.Source.ScreenShare:
      return enabled ? MonitorUpIcon : MonitorOffIcon;
    default:
      return Fragment;
  }
}

/**
 * A toggle button for controlling track publishing state.
 * Displays appropriate icons based on the track source and state.
 *
 * @extends ComponentProps<
  - >
 *
 * @example
 * ```tsx
 * <AgentTrackToggle
 *   source={Track.Source.Microphone}
 *   pressed={isMicEnabled}
 *   onPressedChange={(pressed) => setMicEnabled(pressed)}
 * />
 * ```
 */
export function AgentTrackToggle({
  size = 
  - ,
  variant = 
  - ,
  source,
  pending = false,
  pressed,
  defaultPressed = false,
  className,
  onPressedChange,
  ...props
}) {
  const [uncontrolledPressed, setUncontrolledPressed] = useState(defaultPressed ?? false);
  const isControlled = pressed !== undefined;
  const resolvedPressed = useMemo(
    () => (isControlled ? pressed : uncontrolledPressed) ?? false,
    [isControlled, pressed, uncontrolledPressed]
  );
  const IconComponent = getSourceIcon(source, resolvedPressed, pending);
  const handlePressedChange = (nextPressed) => {
    if (!isControlled) {
      setUncontrolledPressed(nextPressed);
    }
    onPressedChange?.(nextPressed);
  };

  return (
    <Toggle
      size={size}
      variant={variant}
      pressed={isControlled ? pressed : undefined}
      defaultPressed={isControlled ? undefined : defaultPressed}
      aria-label={`Toggle ${source}`}
      onPressedChange={handlePressedChange}
      className={cn(agentTrackToggleVariants({
        size,
        variant: variant ?? 
  - ,
        className,
      }))}
      {...props}>
      <IconComponent className={cn(pending &&

const defaultFormatMessage = message => {
  const roleLabel =
    message.role.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + message.role.slice(1);
  return `**${roleLabel}:** ${message.content}`;
};

export const messagesToMarkdown = (messages, formatMessage = defaultFormatMessage) => messages.map((msg, i) => formatMessage(msg, i)).join(
  - );

export const ConversationDownload = ({
  messages,
  filename = 
  - ,
  formatMessage = defaultFormatMessage,
  className,
  children,
  ...props
}) => {
  const handleDownload = useCallback(() => {
    const markdown = messagesToMarkdown(messages, formatMessage);
    const blob = new Blob([markdown], { type: 
  -  });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const link = document.createElement(
  - );
    link.href = url;
    link.download = filename;
    document.body.append(link);
    link.click();
    link.remove();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  }, [messages, filename, formatMessage]);

  return (
    <Button
      className={cn(
        
  - ,
        className
      )}
      onClick={handleDownload}
      size=
  - 
      type=
  - 
      variant=
  - 
      {...props}>
      {children ?? <DownloadIcon className=

export const MessageAction = ({
  tooltip,
  children,
  label,
  variant = 
  - ,
  size = 
  - ,
  ...props
}) => {
  const button = (
    <Button size={size} type=
  -  variant={variant} {...props}>
      {children}
      <span className=
  - >{label || tooltip}</span>
    </Button>
  );

  if (tooltip) {
    return (
      <TooltipProvider>
        <Tooltip>
          <TooltipTrigger asChild>{button}</TooltipTrigger>
          <TooltipContent>
            <p>{tooltip}</p>
          </TooltipContent>
        </Tooltip>
      </TooltipProvider>
    );
  }

  return button;
};

const MessageBranchContext = createContext(null);

const useMessageBranch = () => {
  const context = useContext(MessageBranchContext);

  if (!context) {
    throw new Error(
  - );
  }

  return context;
};

export const MessageBranch = ({
  defaultBranch = 0,
  onBranchChange,
  className,
  ...props
}) => {
  const [currentBranch, setCurrentBranch] = useState(defaultBranch);
  const [branches, setBranches] = useState([]);

  const handleBranchChange = useCallback((newBranch) => {
    setCurrentBranch(newBranch);
    onBranchChange?.(newBranch);
  }, [onBranchChange]);

  const goToPrevious = useCallback(() => {
    const newBranch =
      currentBranch > 0 ? currentBranch - 1 : branches.length - 1;
    handleBranchChange(newBranch);
  }, [currentBranch, branches.length, handleBranchChange]);

  const goToNext = useCallback(() => {
    const newBranch =
      currentBranch < branches.length - 1 ? currentBranch + 1 : 0;
    handleBranchChange(newBranch);
  }, [currentBranch, branches.length, handleBranchChange]);

  const contextValue = useMemo(() => ({
    branches,
    currentBranch,
    goToNext,
    goToPrevious,
    setBranches,
    totalBranches: branches.length,
  }), [branches, currentBranch, goToNext, goToPrevious]);

  return (
    <MessageBranchContext.Provider value={contextValue}>
      <div className={cn(
  - , className)} {...props} />
    </MessageBranchContext.Provider>
  );
};

export const MessageBranchContent = ({
  children,
  ...props
}) => {
  const { currentBranch, setBranches, branches } = useMessageBranch();
  const childrenArray = useMemo(() => (Array.isArray(children) ? children : [children]), [children]);

  // Use useEffect to update branches when they change
  useEffect(() => {
    if (branches.length !== childrenArray.length) {
      setBranches(childrenArray);
    }
  }, [childrenArray, branches, setBranches]);

  return childrenArray.map((branch, index) => (
    <div
      className={cn(
        
  - ,
        index === currentBranch ? 
  -  : 
  - 
      )}
      key={branch.key}
      {...props}>
      {branch}
    </div>
  ));
};

export const MessageBranchSelector = ({
  className,
  ...props
}) => {
  const { totalBranches } = useMessageBranch();

  // Don
  - s only one branch
  if (totalBranches <= 1) {
    return null;
  }

  return (
    <ButtonGroup
      className={cn(
        
  - ,
        className
      )}
      orientation=
  - 
      {...props} />
  );
};

export const MessageBranchPrevious = ({
  children,
  ...props
}) => {
  const { goToPrevious, totalBranches } = useMessageBranch();

  return (
    <Button
      aria-label=
  - 
      disabled={totalBranches <= 1}
      onClick={goToPrevious}
      size=
  - 
      type=
  - 
      variant=
  - 
      {...props}>
      {children ?? <ChevronLeftIcon size={14} />}
    </Button>
  );
};

export const MessageBranchNext = ({
  children,
  ...props
}) => {
  const { goToNext, totalBranches } = useMessageBranch();

  return (
    <Button
      aria-label=
  - 
      disabled={totalBranches <= 1}
      onClick={goToNext}
      size=
  - 
      type=
  - 
      variant=
  - 
      {...props}>
      {children ?? <ChevronRightIcon size={14} />}
    </Button>
  );
};

export const MessageBranchPage = ({
  className,
  ...props
}) => {
  const { currentBranch, totalBranches } = useMessageBranch();

  return (
    <ButtonGroupText
      className={cn(
  - , className)}
      {...props}>
      {currentBranch + 1}of {totalBranches}
    </ButtonGroupText>
  );
};

const CareerCarousel = () => {

  const dispatch = useDispatch();

  const nav = useNavigate();

  const { jobPostFilter } = useSelector((state) => state.filter);

  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = React.useState(true);

  const [topCareers, setTopCareers] = React.useState([]);

  const [parentWidth, setParentWidth] = React.useState(0);

  const [col, setCol] = React.useState(5);



  React.useEffect(() => {

    const handleResize = () => {

      const newWidth = document.getElementById(
  - ).offsetWidth;

      setParentWidth(newWidth);

    };



    handleResize();



    window.addEventListener(
  - , handleResize);

    return () => window.removeEventListener(
  - , handleResize);

  }, []);



  React.useEffect(() => {

    if (parentWidth < 600) {

      setCol(2);

    } else if (parentWidth < 900) {

      setCol(3);

    } else if (parentWidth < 1200) {

      setCol(4);

    } else {

      setCol(5);

    }

  }, [parentWidth]);



  React.useEffect(() => {

    const getTopCarreers = async () => {

      setIsLoading(true);



      try {

        const resData = await commonService.getTop10Careers();



        setTopCareers(resData.data);

      } catch (error) {

      } finally {

        setIsLoading(false);

      }

    };



    getTopCarreers();

  }, []);



  const handleFilter = (id) => {

    dispatch(searchJobPost({ ...jobPostFilter, careerId: id }));

    nav(`/${ROUTES.JOB_SEEKER.JOBS}`);

  };



  return (

    <div id=
  - >

      <Box sx={styles}>

        <Swiper

          slidesPerView={col}

          spaceBetween={15}

          pagination={{

            clickable: true,

          }}

          autoplay={{

            delay: 2500,

            disableOnInteraction: true,

          }}

  - ,

  - ,

                          transform: 
  - ,

                        },

                        
  - : {

                          color: (theme) => theme.palette.primary.main,

                        },

                      },

                    }}

                    onClick={() => handleFilter(value.id)}

                    <Stack

                      direction=
  - 

                      justifyContent=
  -

                        p: 2,

                        
  - : {

                          transition: 
  - ,

      unsubscribe();

      nav(`/${ROUTES.JOB_SEEKER.CHAT}`);
    }

const ColorPickerDialog = ({ open, onClose, onColorSelect }) => {

  const [selectedColor, setSelectedColor] = React.useState(defaultTheme.palette.primary.main);

  const [showCustomPicker, setShowCustomPicker] = React.useState(false);



  const handleColorSelect = (color) => {

    setSelectedColor(color);

    setShowCustomPicker(false);

  };



  const handleCustomColorChange = (color) => {

    setSelectedColor(color.hex);

  };



  const handleConfirm = () => {

    onColorSelect(selectedColor);

    onClose();

  };

    <Dialog 

      open={open} 

      onClose={onClose}

  -

                    width: 40,

                    height: 40,

                    borderRadius: 1,

                    bgcolor: color,

                    cursor: 
  - ,

                    border: selectedColor === color ? 
  -  : 
  - ,

  -  : 
  - ,

                      opacity: 0.8,

                  }}

                />

              <Box

                onClick={() => setShowCustomPicker(true)}

                sx={{

                  width: 40,

                  height: 40,

                  borderRadius: 1,

                  background: 
  - ,

                  cursor: 
  - ,

                  border: showCustomPicker ? 
  -  : 
  - ,

                  borderColor: showCustomPicker ? 
  -  : 
  - ,

                  
  - : {

                    opacity: 0.8,

                  },

                }}

            </Stack>

          </Box>

            <Box sx={{ display: 
  - , justifyContent: 
  -  }}>

                onChange={handleCustomColorChange}

const Companies = () => {

  const { pageSize } = companyFilter;

        const resData = await companyService.getCompanies({

          ...companyFilter,

          page: page,

        });



        const data = resData.data;

        console.error(error);

        setIsLoading(false);

const FollowComponent = ({ slug, isFollowed }) => {

  const { isAuthenticated, currentUser } = useSelector((state) => state.user);

  const [isLoadingFollow, setIsLoadingFollow] = React.useState(false);

  const [followed, setFollowed] = React.useState(isFollowed);



  const handleFollow = (slug) => {

    const follow = async (slugCompany) => {

      setIsLoadingFollow(true);

      try {

        const resData = await companyService.followCompany(slugCompany);

        const isFollowed = resData.data.isFollowed;



        setFollowed(isFollowed);

        toastMessages.success(

          isFollowed ? 
  -  : 
  - 

        );

      } catch (error) {

        errorHandling(error);

      } finally {

        setIsLoadingFollow(false);

      }

    };



    follow(slug);

  };



  return (

    <>

      {isAuthenticated && currentUser?.roleName === ROLES_NAME.JOB_SEEKER && (

        <Stack justifyContent=
  -  sx={{ py: 1, px: 2, height: 
  -  }}>

          <LoadingButton

            fullWidth

            onClick={() => handleFollow(slug)}

            startIcon={

              followed ? (

                <BookmarkIcon sx={{ color: 
  -  }} />

              ) : (

                <BookmarkBorderIcon />

              )

            }

            loading={isLoadingFollow}

            loadingPosition=
  - 

            variant={followed ? 
  -  : 
  - }

            color=
  - 

            sx={{ textTransform: 
  -  }}

          >

            <span>

              {followed ? (

                <span style={{ color: 
  -  }}>Đang theo dõi</span>

              ) : (

                
  - 

              )}

            </span>

          </LoadingButton>

        </Stack>

      )}

    </>

  );

};

const CompanyAction = ({ id, views, createAt, resume, company, children }) => {

  const nav = useNavigate();

  const [parentWidth, setParentWidth] = React.useState(0);

  const [stackDirection, setStackDirection] = React.useState(
  - );

  const theme = useTheme();



  React.useEffect(() => {

    const handleResize = () => {

      const newWidth = document.getElementById(
  - ).offsetWidth;

      setParentWidth(newWidth);

    };



    handleResize();



    window.addEventListener(
  - , handleResize);

    return () => window.removeEventListener(
  - , handleResize);

  }, []);



  React.useEffect(() => {

    if (parentWidth < 800) {

      setStackDirection(
  - );

    } else {

      setStackDirection(
  - );

    }

  }, [parentWidth]);



  return (

    <div id=
  - >

      <Card

        variant=
  - 

        sx={{

          p: 1.5,

          transition: 
  - ,

          border: `1px solid ${theme.palette.grey[100]}`,

          boxShadow: 0,

          
  - : {

            borderColor: theme.palette.primary.main,

            boxShadow: theme.customShadows.small,

            transform: 
  - 

          },

        }}

      >

        <Stack direction={stackDirection} spacing={1.5} width=
  - >

          <Stack direction=
  -  spacing={2}>

            <Stack justifyContent=
  - >

              <MuiImageCustom

                width={85}

                height={85}

                src={company?.companyImageUrl}

                sx={{ 

                  borderRadius: 2,

                  border: `1px solid ${theme.palette.grey[200]}`,

                  p: 0.5,

                  backgroundColor: 
  - ,

                }}

              />

            </Stack>

            <Stack

              flex={1}

              justifyContent=
  -  

              spacing={1}

              style={{ overflow: 
  -  }}

            >

              <Tooltip followCursor title={company?.companyName}>

                <Typography

                  variant=
  - 

                  sx={{

                    fontSize: 16,

                    cursor: 
  - ,

                    color: theme.palette.primary.main,

                    transition: 
  - ,

                    
  - : {

                      color: theme.palette.primary.dark

                    }

                  }}

                  noWrap

                  onClick={() => nav(`/${formatRoute(ROUTES.JOB_SEEKER.COMPANY_DETAIL, company?.slug)}`)}

                >

                  {company?.companyName}

                </Typography>

              </Tooltip>

                <Typography

                  variant=

                    color: theme.palette.text.secondary,

                    display: 
  - ,

const FileDropzone = ({ accept, onDrop, values }) => {

  const { getRootProps, getInputProps } = useDropzone({

    accept,

    onDrop,

  });



  return (

    <Box

      sx={{

        borderStyle: 
  - ,

        borderWidth: 2,

        borderColor: (theme) => theme.palette.grey[300],

        borderRadius: 3,

        backgroundColor: (theme) => theme.palette.grey[50],

        transition: 
  - ,

        cursor: 
  - ,

        py: 6,

        
  - : {

          borderColor: (theme) => theme.palette.primary.main,

          backgroundColor: (theme) => theme.palette.primary.background,

        },

      }}

      {...getRootProps({ className: 
  -  })}

    >

      <input {...getInputProps()} />

      <Stack

        direction=
  - 

        alignItems=
  - 

        spacing={2}

      >

        {!values ? (

          <>

            <Box

              sx={{

                backgroundColor: (theme) => theme.palette.primary.background,

                borderRadius: 
  - ,

                width: 60,

                height: 60,

                display: 
  - ,

                alignItems: 
  - ,

                justifyContent: 
  - ,

                color: (theme) => theme.palette.primary.main,

              }}

            >

              <FileUploadOutlinedIcon sx={{ fontSize: 24 }} />

            </Box>

            <Typography 

              variant=
  -  

              sx={{ 

                color: (theme) => theme.palette.grey[800],

                fontWeight: 600 

              }}

            >

              Kéo hồ sơ của bạn vào đây

            </Typography>

            <Typography variant=
  -  color=
  - >

              Hoặc bạn có thể

            </Typography>

            <Button

              variant=
  - 

              size=
  - 

              color=
  - 

              sx={{

                px: 3,

                py: 1,

                borderRadius: 2,

                boxShadow: (theme) => theme.customShadows.small,

            >

            </Typography>

            <Typography 

              variant=
  -

const DatePickerCustom = ({
  name,
  control,
  title = null,
  showRequired = false,
  minDate = null,
  maxDate = null,
}) => {
  const parseDate = (date) => {
    if (!date) return null;
    try {
      const parsedDate = dayjs(date);
      return parsedDate.isValid() ? parsedDate : null;
    } catch {
      return null;
    }
  };

  return (
    <div>
      {title && (
        <Typography variant=
  -  gutterBottom>
          {title} {showRequired && <span style={{ color: 
  -  }}>*</span>}
        </Typography>
      )}
      <Controller
        name={name}
        control={control}
        render={({ field, fieldState }) => (
          <>
            <div>
              <DatePicker
                maxDate={parseDate(maxDate)}
                minDate={parseDate(minDate)}
                format=
  - 
                sx={{
                  
  - : {
                    height: 
  - ,
                    py: 2.5,
                  },
                  width: 
  - ,
                }}
                value={parseDate(field.value)}
                onChange={(newValue) => {
                  const date = parseDate(newValue);
                  const localDate = date ? dayjs.tz(date, 
  - ) : null;
                  field.onChange(localDate ? localDate.format(
  - ) : null);
                }}
                slotProps={{
                  textField: {
                    error: fieldState.invalid,
                    helperText: fieldState.error?.message,
                  },
                }}
                timezone=
  - 
                referenceDate={dayjs().tz(
  - )}
              />
            </div>

            {fieldState.invalid && (
              <span
                style={{
                  color: 
  - ,
                  fontSize: 13,
                  marginTop: 1,
                  marginLeft: 1,
                }}
              >
                <ErrorOutlineIcon fontSize=

const FileUploadCustom = ({

  control,

  name,

  title = 
  - ,

  showRequired = false,

}) => {

  const [selectedFile, setSelectedFile] = React.useState(null);

  const inputRef = React.useRef(null);



  const handleInputClick = (e) => {

    e.preventDefault();

    inputRef.current.click();

  };



  const handleFileChange = (event, onChange) => {

    const file = event.target.files[0];

    setSelectedFile(file || null);



    onChange(file);

  };



  return (

    <div>

      {title && (

        <Typography 

          variant=
  -  

          gutterBottom 

          sx={{

            fontWeight: 500,

            color: 
  - ,

            mb: 1

          }}

const InputBaseSearchHomeCustom = ({

  name,

  control,

  placeholder,

  showSubmitButton = false,

  location = 
  - ,

}) => {

  const inputRef = React.useRef();

  const inputSearchRef = React.useRef();

  const nav = useNavigate();

  const dispatch = useDispatch();

  const [showResult, setShowResult] = React.useState(false);

  const [searchValue, setSearchValue] = React.useState(
  - );

  const [searchResult, setSearchResult] = React.useState([]);

  const [recentSearch, setRecentSearch] = React.useState([]);

  const debounded = useDebounce(searchValue, 300);

  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = React.useState(false);



  React.useEffect(() => {

    try {

      const keywordListStr = localStorage.getItem(
  - );

      if (

        keywordListStr !== null ||

        keywordListStr !== undefined ||

        keywordListStr !== 
  - 

      ) {

        setRecentSearch(JSON.parse(keywordListStr));

      }

      console.error(
  - , error);

    }

  }, []);

    if (!debounded.trim()) {

      setSearchResult([]);

      return;

    }

      if (!isLoading) {

        setIsLoading(true);

      }



      try {

        const resData = await jobService.searchJobSuggestTitle(kw);

        const data = resData?.data;



        setSearchResult(data.flat());

      } catch (error) {

        console.error(
  - , error);

      } finally {

        setIsLoading(false);

      }

    };



    getSuggestTitle(debounded);

  }, [debounded]);

    setShowResult(!showResult);

  };

    dispatch(searchJobPostWithKeyword({ kw: kw }));

  - :

        break;

      default:

        break;

    }

  };

      <Tippy

        placement=
  -

            {...attrs}

  -  : 
  - ,

                </Typography>

                  {isLoading ? (
                    <Stack sx={{ py: 2 }} justifyContent=
  -  alignItems=
  - >
                      <CircularProgress size={20} />
                    </Stack>
                  ) : searchResult.length === 0 ? (
                    <Typography

                      my={1}

                      textAlign=
  - 

                      color={
  - }

                      variant=
  - 

                    >

                      Không có dữ liệu

                    </Typography>

                  ) : (

                    <List>

                      {searchResult.map((value) => (

                        <ListItem

                          sx={{

                            
  - : {

                              backgroundColor: 
  - ,

                            },

                            cursor: 
  - ,

                            borderRadius: 1,

                            px: 0.5,

                          }}

  - ,

import { Box, Button, IconButton, Stack } from 
  - ;
import RefreshIcon from 
  - ;
import { DatePicker } from 
  - ;

import dayjs from 
  - ;

function getMonthDiff(dateA, dateB) {
  const msPerDay = 86400000; // so milisecond trong mot ngay

  // tinh so ngay giua hai ngay
  const daysDiff = Math.round((dateB - dateA) / msPerDay);

  // tinh so thang va ngay con lai
  const monthDiff = Math.floor(daysDiff / 30);
  const daysRemaining = daysDiff % 30;

  return { months: monthDiff, days: daysRemaining };
}

const RangePickerCustom = ({
  allowSubmit,
  setAllowSubmit,
  selectedDateRange,
  setSelectedDateRange,
}) => {
  const [maxDate, setMaxDate] = React.useState(dayjs());

  const handleDateRangeChange = (startValue, endValue) => {
    if (startValue && endValue) {
      const startDate = new Date(dayjs(startValue).format(
  - ));
      const endDate = new Date(dayjs(endValue).format(
  - ));
      const { months, days } = getMonthDiff(startDate, endDate);

      if (months > 1 || (months === 1 && days > 1)) {
        const capped = dayjs(startValue).add(1, 
  - );
        setSelectedDateRange([startValue, capped]);
        return;
      }
    }

    setSelectedDateRange([startValue, endValue]);
  };

  function handleCalendarChange(dates) {
    if (
      dates !== null &&
      Array.isArray(dates) &&
      dates.length > 0 &&
      dates[0] !== null
    ) {
      const startDateString = dayjs(dates[0]).format(
  - );
      const startDate = new Date(startDateString);
      const endDate = new Date(startDate);
      endDate.setMonth(endDate.getMonth() + 1);

      if (endDate < new Date()) {
        setMaxDate(dayjs(endDate));
      } else {
        setMaxDate(dayjs());
      }
    }
  }

  const refreshFilter = () => {
    setSelectedDateRange([dayjs().subtract(1, 
  - ), dayjs()]);
    setMaxDate(dayjs());
    setAllowSubmit(!allowSubmit);
  };

  const startValue = selectedDateRange?.[0] || null;
  const endValue = selectedDateRange?.[1] || null;
  const maxEndDate = React.useMemo(() => {
    if (!startValue) return dayjs();
    const capped = dayjs(startValue).add(1, 
  - );
    return capped.isAfter(dayjs()) ? dayjs() : capped;
  }, [startValue]);

  return (
    <>
      <Stack direction=
  -  spacing={1} alignItems=
  - >
        <Box width={120}>
          <DatePicker
            value={startValue}
            onChange={(newValue) => {
              handleCalendarChange([newValue]);
              handleDateRangeChange(newValue, endValue);
            }}
            format=
  - 
            maxDate={maxDate}
            slotProps={{ textField: { size: 
  -  } }}
          />
        </Box>
        <Box width={120}>
          <DatePicker
            value={endValue}
            onChange={(newValue) => handleDateRangeChange(startValue, newValue)}
            format=
  - 
            minDate={startValue || undefined}
            maxDate={maxEndDate}
            slotProps={{ textField: { size: 
  -  } }}
          />
        </Box>
      </Stack>
      <IconButton aria-label=
  -  size=
  -  onClick={refreshFilter}>
        <RefreshIcon fontSize=
  -  />
      </IconButton>
      <Box>
        <Button
          size=
  - 
          variant=
  - 
          color=
  - 
          style={{ textTransform: 

FILE: c:\Users\leduc\Documents\square-tuyen-dung\frontend\src\components\controls\RatingCustom\index.jsx

import { Controller } from

import { Autocomplete, TextField, Typography } from 
  - ;

import ErrorOutlineIcon from 
  - ;
const TextFieldAutoCompleteCustom = ({
  name,
  control,
  title = null,
  showRequired=false,
  placeholder = 
  - ,
  disabled = false,
  options,
  loading,
  handleSelect,
  helperText = 
  - ,
}) => {
  const [open, setOpen] = React.useState(false);

  return (
    <div>
      {title && (
        <Typography variant=
  -  gutterBottom>
          {title} {showRequired && <span style={{ color: 
  -  }}>*</span>}
        </Typography>
      )}
      <Controller
        control={control}
        name={name}
        defaultValue=
  - 
        render={({ field, fieldState }) => (
          <>
            <Autocomplete
              freeSolo
              id={field.name}
              disabled={disabled}
              open={open}
              onOpen={() => {
                setOpen(true);
              }}
              onClose={() => {
                setOpen(false);
              }}
              getOptionLabel={(option) =>
                option?.description || field.value || 
  - 
              }
              options={options}
              loading={loading}
              onChange={handleSelect}
              inputValue={field.value}
              onInputChange={(e, newValue) => field.onChange(newValue || 
  - )}
              renderInput={(params) => (
                <TextField
                error={fieldState.invalid}
                  {...params}
                  size=
  - 
                  placeholder={placeholder}
                  InputProps={{
                    ...params.InputProps,
                  }}
                  helperText={!fieldState.invalid ? helperText : 
  - }
                />
              )}
            />
            {fieldState.invalid && (
              <span
                style={{
                  color: 
  - ,
                  fontSize: 13,
                  marginTop: 1,
                  marginLeft: 1,
                }}

import { Controller } from 
  - ;
import { InputAdornment, TextField, Typography } from 
  - ;

import ErrorOutlineIcon from 
  - ;
const TextFieldCustom = ({
  name,
  control,
  title = null,
  showRequired = false,
  placeholder = 
  - ,
  helperText = 
  - ,
  disabled = false,
  icon = null,
  type = 
  - ,
}) => {
  // Format display number with comma
  const formatDisplay = (value) => {
    if (type !== 
  -  || !value) return value;
    return value.toString().replace(/\B(?=(\d{3})+(?!\d))/g, 
  - );
  };

  return (
    <div>
      {title && (
        <Typography variant=
  -  gutterBottom>
          {title} {showRequired && <span style={{ color: 
  -  }}>*</span>}
        </Typography>
      )}
      <Controller
        name={name}
        control={control}
        render={({ field, fieldState }) => (
          <>
            <TextField
              fullWidth
              variant=
  - 
              size=
  - 
              id={field.name}
              placeholder={placeholder}
              defaultValue=
  - 
              value={formatDisplay(field.value)}
              onChange={(e) => {
                const value = e.target.value.replace(/,/g, 
  - );
                if (type === 
  -  && !/^\d*$/.test(value)) return;
                field.onChange(value);
              }}
              onBlur={field.onBlur}
              error={fieldState.invalid}
              disabled={disabled}
              helperText={!fieldState.invalid ? helperText : 
  - }
              InputProps={{
                inputProps: {
                  inputMode: type === 
  -  ? 
  -  : 
  - ,
                },
                startAdornment: icon && (
                  <InputAdornment position=
  - >{icon}</InputAdornment>
                ),
              }}
            />
            {fieldState.invalid && (
              <span
                style={{
                  color: 
  - ,
                  fontSize: 13,
                  marginTop: 1,
                  marginLeft: 1,
                }}
              >
                <ErrorOutlineIcon fontSize=
  -  />{

import PropTypes from 
  - ;
import Box from 
  - ;
import Table from 
  - ;
import TableCell from 
  - ;
import TableContainer from 
  - ;
import TableHead from 
  - ;
import TablePagination from 
  - ;
import TableRow from 
  - ;
import TableSortLabel from 
  - ;
import { visuallyHidden } from 
  - ;
import { Skeleton, Stack } from 
  - ;


function EnhancedTableHead({ headCells = [], order, orderBy, onRequestSort }) {
  const createSortHandler = (property) => (event) => {
    if (!onRequestSort) return;
    onRequestSort(event, property);
  };

  return (
    <TableHead>
      <TableRow>
        {headCells.map((headCell) => (
          <TableCell
            key={headCell.id}
            align={headCell.numeric ? 
  -  : 
  - }
            padding={headCell.disablePadding ? 
  -  : 
  - }
            sortDirection={orderBy === headCell.id ? order : false}
          >
            {(() => {
              const sortable = Boolean(onRequestSort) && Boolean(headCell.showOrder);
              return (
            <TableSortLabel
              disabled={!sortable}
              active={sortable && orderBy === headCell.id}
              direction={orderBy === headCell.id ? order : 
  - }
              onClick={createSortHandler(headCell.id)}
            >
              {headCell.label}
              {orderBy === headCell.id ? (
                <Box component=
  -  sx={visuallyHidden}>
                  {order === 
  -  ? 
  -  : 
  - }
                </Box>
              ) : null}
            </TableSortLabel>
              );
            })()}
          </TableCell>
        ))}
      </TableRow>
    </TableHead>
  );
}

EnhancedTableHead.propTypes = {
  onRequestSort: PropTypes.func,
  order: PropTypes.oneOf([
  - , 
  - ]),
  orderBy: PropTypes.string,
};

  -  }}>

  - 
          size=
  - 
        >
          <EnhancedTableHead
            headCells={headCells}
            order={resolvedOrder}
            orderBy={resolvedOrderBy}
            onRequestSort={resolvedRequestSort}
          />
          {children}
        </Table>
      </TableContainer>
      <TablePagination
        rowsPerPageOptions={[5, 10, 25]}
        component=

    const handleResize = () => {

      const newWidth =

        document.getElementById(
  - ).offsetWidth;

      setParentWidth(newWidth);

    };



    handleResize();



    window.addEventListener(
  - , handleResize);

    return () => window.removeEventListener(
  - , handleResize);

  }, []);



  React.useEffect(() => {

    if (parentWidth < 600) {

      setCol(2);

    } else if (parentWidth < 900) {

      setCol(3);

    } else if (parentWidth < 1200) {

      setCol(4);

    } else {

      setCol(4);

    }

  }, [parentWidth]);

    const getFeedbacks = async () => {

      setIsLoading(true);

      const resData = await myjobService.getFeedbacks();



      setFeedbacks(resData.data);

      try {

      } catch (error) {

      } finally {

        setIsLoading(false);

      }

    };



    getFeedbacks();

  }, []);



  return (

    <div id=
  - >

      <Box sx={styles}>

        {isLoading ? (

          <Swiper

            slidesPerView={col}

            spaceBetween={30}

            pagination={{

              clickable: true,

            }}

            autoplay={{

              delay: 2500,

              disableOnInteraction: true,

            }}

              <SwiperSlide key={item}>

import { useSelector } from 
  - ;

import { useNavigate } from 
  - ;

import dayjs from 
  - ;

import { Box, Card, Skeleton, Stack, Tooltip, Typography } from 
  - ;

import { useTheme } from 
  - ;



import { salaryString } from 
  - ;

import { FontAwesomeIcon } from 
  - ;

import {

  faCalendarDays,

  faCircleDollarToSlot,

  faLocationDot,

} from 
  - ;

import MuiImageCustom from 
  - ;

import { ROUTES } from 
  - ;

  - ;



const JobPostAction = ({

  id,

  slug,

  companyImageUrl,

  companyName,

  jobName,

  cityId,

  deadline,

  isUrgent,

  isHot,

  salaryMin,

  salaryMax,

  children,

}) => {

  const nav = useNavigate();

  const { allConfig } = useSelector((state) => state.config);

  const [parentWidth, setParentWidth] = React.useState(0);

  const [stackDirection, setStackDirection] = React.useState(
  - );

  const theme = useTheme();



  React.useEffect(() => {

    const handleResize = () => {

      const newWidth = document.getElementById(
  - ).offsetWidth;

      setParentWidth(newWidth);

    };



    handleResize();



    window.addEventListener(
  - , handleResize);

    return () => window.removeEventListener(
  - , handleResize);

  }, []);



  React.useEffect(() => {

    if (parentWidth < 600) {

      setStackDirection(
  - );

    } else {

      setStackDirection(
  - );

    }

  }, [parentWidth]);



  return (

    <div id=
  - >

      <Card

        variant=
  - 

        sx={{

          p: 2,

          transition: 
  - ,

          border: `1px solid ${theme.palette.grey[100]}`,

          boxShadow: 0,

          
  - : {

            borderColor: theme.palette.primary.main,

            boxShadow: theme.customShadows.small,

            transform: 
  - 

          },

        }}

      >

        <Stack direction={stackDirection} spacing={2}>

          <Box width={stackDirection === 
  -  ? 
  -  : 
  - }>

            <Stack direction=
  -  spacing={2}>

              <Stack direction=
  -  justifyContent=
  - >

                <MuiImageCustom

                  width={70}

                  height={70}

                  src={companyImageUrl}

                  sx={{

                    borderRadius: 2,

                    border: `1px solid ${theme.palette.grey[200]}`,

                    p: 0.5,

                    backgroundColor: 
  - ,

                  }}

                />

              </Stack>

              <Stack

                flex={1}

                justifyContent=
  - 

                style={{ overflow: 
  -  }}

              >

                <Box>

                  <Tooltip followCursor title={jobName}>

                    <Typography

                      variant=
  - 

                      sx={{

                        fontSize: 16,

                        cursor: 
  - ,

                        color: theme.palette.primary.main,

                        transition: 
  - ,

                        mb: 0.5,

                        
  - : {

                          color: theme.palette.primary.dark

                        }

                      }}

                      onClick={() => nav(`/${formatRoute(ROUTES.JOB_SEEKER.JOB_DETAIL, slug)}`)}

                      noWrap

                    >

                      {jobName}

                    </Typography>

                  </Tooltip>



                  <Tooltip followCursor title={companyName}>

                    <Typography

                      variant=
  - 

                      sx={{

                        color: theme.palette.text.secondary,

                        fontWeight: 500,

                      }}

                      noWrap

                    >

                      {companyName}

                    </Typography>

                  </Tooltip>

                </Box>



                <Stack

                  direction=
  - 

                  spacing={2}

                  sx={{

                    
  - : {

                      display: 
  - ,

                      alignItems: 
  - ,

                      gap: 1,

                      color: theme.palette.text.secondary,

                      fontSize: 
  - ,

                      
  - : {

                        fontSize: 14,

                        color: theme.palette.grey[400]

                      }

                    }

                  }}

                >

                  <Typography className=
  - >

                    <FontAwesomeIcon icon={faCircleDollarToSlot} />

                    {salaryString(salaryMin, salaryMax)}

                  </Typography>

                  <Typography className=
  - >

                    <FontAwesomeIcon icon={faLocationDot} />

                    {allConfig?.cityDict[cityId] || (

                        color: theme.palette.grey[400],

  - ;

  - ;

  - ;



delete L.Icon.Default.prototype._getIconUrl;

L.Icon.Default.mergeOptions({

  iconUrl: ICONS.LOCATION_MARKER,

  iconRetinaUrl: markerIconRetina,

  shadowUrl: markerShadow,

  iconSize: [56, 56],

  iconAnchor: [28, 60],

  popupAnchor: [0, -60],

  shadowSize: [41, 41]

});

FILE: c:\Users\leduc\Documents\square-tuyen-dung\frontend\src\components\NotificationCard\index.jsx
  - ;

import { useSelector } from 
  - ;

import { useNavigate } from 
  - ;

import TimeAgo from 
  - ;

import {

  Badge,

  Box,

  Grid,

  IconButton,

  Menu,

  Stack,

  Typography,

} from 
  - ;

import NotificationsIcon from 
  - ;

import ClearIcon from 
  - ;



import {

  collection,

  getDocs,

  limit,

  onSnapshot,

  query,

  where,

  startAfter,

  orderBy,

  updateDoc,

  doc,

  writeBatch,

} from 
  - ;

import db from 
  - ;



import { IMAGES, ROUTES } from 
  - ;

import MuiImageCustom from 
  - ;

import { formatRoute } from 
  - ;



const PAGE_SIZE = 5;



const NotificationCard = () => {

  const nav = useNavigate();

  const { currentUser } = useSelector((state) => state.user);

  const [count, setCount] = React.useState(0);

  const [badgeCount, setBadgeCount] = React.useState(0);

  const [notifications, setNotifications] = React.useState([]);

  const [lastKey, setLastKey] = React.useState(null);

  const [anchorEl, setAnchorEl] = React.useState(null);

  const open = Boolean(anchorEl);



  const handleClick = (event) => {

    setAnchorEl(event.currentTarget);

  };



  const handleClose = () => {

    setAnchorEl(null);

  };



  React.useEffect(() => {

    const notificationsRef = collection(

      db,

      
  - ,

      `${currentUser.id}`,

      
  - 

    );

    const allQuery = query(

      notificationsRef,

      where(
  - , 
  - , false),

      where(
  - , 
  - , false)

    );



    const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(allQuery, (querySnapshot) => {

      let total = 0;

      querySnapshot.forEach((doc) => {

        total = total + 1;

      });

      setBadgeCount(total);

    });



    return () => {

      unsubscribe();

    };

  }, [currentUser.id]);



  React.useEffect(() => {

    const notificationsRef = collection(

      db,

      
  - ,

      `${currentUser.id}`,

      
  - 

    );

    const allQuery = query(notificationsRef, where(
  - , 
  - , false));



    const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(allQuery, (querySnapshot) => {

      let total = 0;

      querySnapshot.forEach((doc) => {

        total = total + 1;

      });

      setCount(total);

    });



    return () => {

      unsubscribe();

    };

  }, [currentUser.id]);



  React.useEffect(() => {

    const notificationsRef = collection(

      db,

      
  - ,

      `${currentUser.id}`,

      
  - 

    );

    const first = query(

      notificationsRef,

      where(
  - , 
  - , false),

      orderBy(
  - , 
  - ),

      limit(PAGE_SIZE)

    );



    const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(first, (querySnapshot) => {

      const notificationList = [];

      querySnapshot.forEach((doc) => {

        notificationList.push({

          ...doc.data(),

          key: doc.id,

        });

      });

      setNotifications(notificationList);

      setLastKey(querySnapshot.docs[querySnapshot.docs.length - 1]);



      return () => {

        unsubscribe();

      };

    });

  }, [currentUser.id]);



  const loadMore = async () => {

    const notificationsRef = collection(

      db,

      
  - ,

      `${currentUser.id}`,

      
  - 

    );

    const nextQuery = query(

      notificationsRef,

      where(
  - , 
  - , false),

      orderBy(
  - , 
  - ),

      startAfter(lastKey),

      limit(PAGE_SIZE)

    );



    const nextNotificationList = [];

    const nextQuerySnapshot = await getDocs(nextQuery);

    const lastVisible =

      nextQuerySnapshot.docs[nextQuerySnapshot.docs.length - 1];



    nextQuerySnapshot.forEach((doc) => {

      nextNotificationList.push({

        ...doc.data(),

        key: doc.id,

      });

    });



    setNotifications([...notifications, ...nextNotificationList]);

    setLastKey(lastVisible);

  };



  const handleRemove = (key) => {

    updateDoc(doc(db, 
  - , `${currentUser.id}`, 
  - , key), {

      is_deleted: true,

    })

      .then(() => {

        const index = notifications.findIndex((value) => value.key === key);

        if (index > -1) {

          let newNotifications = [...notifications];

          newNotifications.splice(index, 1);

          setNotifications(newNotifications);

        }

      })

      .catch((error) => {

        console.log(
  - , error);

      });

  };



  const handleRead = (key) => {

    updateDoc(doc(db, 
  - , `${currentUser.id}`, 
  - , key), {

      is_read: true,

    })

      .then(() => {})

      .catch((error) => {

        console.log(
  - , error);

      });

  };



  const handleRemoveAll = async () => {

    // Get a reference to the notifications collection

    const notificationsRef = collection(

      db,

      
  - ,

      `${currentUser.id}`,

      
  - 

    );

    const deleteQuery = query(

      notificationsRef,

      where(
  - , 
  - , false)

    );

    const querySnapshot = await getDocs(deleteQuery);



    // Create a batch write operation

    const batch = writeBatch(db);



    // Iterate over all documents and add them to the batch

    querySnapshot.forEach((doc) => {

      const docRef = doc.ref;

      batch.update(docRef, { is_deleted: true });

    });



    // Commit the batch write operation

    await batch.commit();

  };



  const handleClickItem = (item) => {

    switch (item.type) {

      case 
  - :

        handleRead(item.key);

        nav(
  - );

        break;

      case 
  - :

        handleRead(item.key);

        nav(`/${ROUTES.JOB_SEEKER.MY_COMPANY}`);

        break;

      case 
  - :

        handleRead(item.key);

        nav(`/${ROUTES.JOB_SEEKER.MY_COMPANY}`);

        break;

      case 
  - :

        handleRead(item.key);

        nav(`/${ROUTES.JOB_SEEKER.MY_JOB}`);

        break;

      case 
  - :

        handleRead(item.key);

        nav(`/${ROUTES.EMPLOYER.PROFILE}`);

        break;

      case 
  - :

        handleRead(item.key);

        nav(`/${ROUTES.EMPLOYER.JOB_POST}`);

        break;

      case 
  - :

        handleRead(item.key);

        nav(

          `/${formatRoute(ROUTES.EMPLOYER.PROFILE_DETAIL, item[
  - ]?.resume_slug)}`

        );

        break;

      default:

        break;

    }



    handleClose();

  };



  return (

    <React.Fragment>

      <Box sx={{ display: 
  - , alignItems: 
  - , textAlign: 
  -  }}>

        <IconButton

          size=
  - 

          aria-label=
  - 

          color=
  - 

          onClick={handleClick}

        >

          <Badge badgeContent={badgeCount} color=
  - >

            <NotificationsIcon />

          </Badge>

        </IconButton>

      </Box>

      <Menu

        anchorEl={anchorEl}

        id=
  - 

        open={open}

        onClose={handleClose}

        PaperProps={{

          elevation: 0,

          sx: {

            overflow: 
  - ,

            filter: 
  - ,

            mt: 1.5,

            borderRadius: 2,

            width: 500,

            maxHeight: 500,

            
  - : {

              content: 
  - ,

              display: 
  - ,

              position: 
  - ,

              top: 0,

              right: 14,

              width: 10,

              height: 10,

              bgcolor: 
  - ,

              transform: 
  - ,

              zIndex: 0,

            },

          },

        }}

        transformOrigin={{ horizontal: 
  - , vertical: 
  -  }}

        anchorOrigin={{ horizontal: 
  - , vertical: 
  -  }}

      >

        <Box sx={{ py: 2, px: 2 }}>

          <Box style={{ overflowY: 
  - , maxHeight: 450 }}>

            <Stack spacing={2} sx={{ p: 1 }}>

              {notifications.length === 0 ? (

                <Typography 

                  textAlign=
  -  

                  variant=
  -  

                  color=
  - 

                  sx={{ py: 2 }}

                >

                  Chưa có thông báo nào

                </Typography>

              ) : (

                notifications.map((value, idx) => (

                  <Stack

                    direction=
  - 

                    spacing={2}

                    alignItems=
  - 

                    key={idx}

                    sx={{

const TopCompanyCarousel = () => {
  const nav = useNavigate();
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = React.useState(true);
  const [companies, setCompanies] = React.useState([]);
  const [parentWidth, setParentWidth] = React.useState(0);
  const [col, setCol] = React.useState(5);

  React.useEffect(() => {
    const handleResize = () => {
      const newWidth = document.getElementById(
        
  - 
      ).offsetWidth;
      setParentWidth(newWidth);
    };

    handleResize();

    window.addEventListener(
  - , handleResize);
    return () => window.removeEventListener(
  - , handleResize);
  }, []);

  React.useEffect(() => {
    if (parentWidth < 600) {
      setCol(2);
    } else if (parentWidth < 900) {
      setCol(3);
    } else if (parentWidth < 1200) {
      setCol(4);
    } else {
      setCol(5);
    }
  }, [parentWidth]);

  React.useEffect(() => {
    const getTopCompanies = async () => {
      setIsLoading(true);
      try {
        const resData = await companyService.getTopCompanies();

        setCompanies(resData?.data || []);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error(error);
      } finally {
        setIsLoading(false);
      }
    };

    getTopCompanies();
  }, []);

  return (
    <div id=
  - >
      <Box sx={styles}>
        <Swiper
          slidesPerView={col}
          spaceBetween={15}
          pagination={{
            clickable: true,
          }}
          autoplay={{
            delay: 2500,
            disableOnInteraction: true,
          }}
          modules={[Pagination, Autoplay]}
        >
          {isLoading
            ? Array.from(Array(10).keys()).map((value) => (
                <SwiperSlide key={value}>
                  <Loading />
                </SwiperSlide>
              ))
            : companies.map((value) => (
                <SwiperSlide key={value.id}>
                  <Card
                    sx={{
                      boxShadow: 0,
                      alignItems: 
  - ,
                      p: 2,
                      mb: 0.5,
                      mt: 1,
                      cursor: 
  - ,
                      minHeight: 165,
                      borderRadius: 3,
                      transition: 
  - ,
                      border: 
  - ,
                      borderColor: 
  - ,
                      bgcolor: 
  - ,
                      
  - : {
                        transform: 
  - ,
                        boxShadow: (theme) => theme.customShadows.medium,
                        borderColor: 
  - ,
                        
  - : {
                          color: 
  - ,
                        }
                      },
                    }}
                    onClick={() => nav(`/${formatRoute(ROUTES.JOB_SEEKER.COMPANY_DETAIL, value.slug)}`)}
                  >
                    <Stack direction=
  -  justifyContent=
  - >
                      <MuiImageCustom
                        width={120}
                        height={120}
                        src={value?.companyImageUrl}
                        duration={1500}
                        sx={{ 
                          margin: 
  - ,
                          borderRadius: 2,
                          p: 1,
                          bgcolor: 
  - ,
                          objectFit: 
  - ,
                        }}
                      />
                    </Stack>

                      className=
  - 
                      sx={{
                        textAlign: 
  - ,

                        textOverflow:

                        transition:

function generateConnectingSequenceBar(columns) {
  const seq = [];

  for (let x = 0; x < columns; x++) {
    seq.push([x, columns - 1 - x]);
  }

  return seq;
}

function generateListeningSequenceBar(columns) {
  const center = Math.floor(columns / 2);
  const noIndex = -1;

  return [[center], [noIndex]];
}

export function useAgentAudioVisualizerBarAnimator(state, columns, interval) {
  const [index, setIndex] = useState(0);
  const [sequence, setSequence] = useState([[]]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (state === 
  - ) {
      setSequence(generateListeningSequenceBar(columns));
    } else if (state === 
  -  || state === 
  - ) {
      const sequence = [...generateConnectingSequenceBar(columns)];
      setSequence(sequence);
    } else if (state === 
  - ) {
      setSequence(generateListeningSequenceBar(columns));
    } else if (state === undefined || state === 

FILE: c:\Users\leduc\Documents\square-tuyen-dung\frontend\src\hooks\use-agent-control-bar.js
  - ;
import { Track } from 
  - ;
import {
  useTrackToggle,
  usePersistentUserChoices,
  useLocalParticipantPermissions,
  useLocalParticipant,
} from 
  - ;

const trackSourceToProtocol = (source) => {
  // NOTE: this mapping avoids importing the protocol package as that leads to a significant bundle size increase
  switch (source) {
    case Track.Source.Camera:
      return 1;
    case Track.Source.Microphone:
      return 2;
    case Track.Source.ScreenShare:
      return 3;
    default:
      return 0;
  }
};

export function usePublishPermissions() {
  const localPermissions = useLocalParticipantPermissions();

  const canPublishSource = (source) => {
    return (!!localPermissions?.canPublish && (localPermissions.canPublishSources.length === 0 || localPermissions.canPublishSources.includes(trackSourceToProtocol(source))));
  };

  return {
    camera: canPublishSource(Track.Source.Camera),
    microphone: canPublishSource(Track.Source.Microphone),
    screenShare: canPublishSource(Track.Source.ScreenShare),
    data: localPermissions?.canPublishData ?? false,
  };
}

export function useInputControls(
  {
    saveUserChoices = true,
    onDeviceError
  } = {}
) {
  const { microphoneTrack } = useLocalParticipant();

  const microphoneToggle = useTrackToggle({
    source: Track.Source.Microphone,
    onDeviceError: (error) => onDeviceError?.({ source: Track.Source.Microphone, error }),
  });

  const cameraToggle = useTrackToggle({
    source: Track.Source.Camera,
    onDeviceError: (error) => onDeviceError?.({ source: Track.Source.Camera, error }),
  });

  const screenShareToggle = useTrackToggle({
    source: Track.Source.ScreenShare,
    onDeviceError: (error) => onDeviceError?.({ source: Track.Source.ScreenShare, error }),
  });

  const {
    saveAudioInputEnabled,
    saveVideoInputEnabled,
    saveAudioInputDeviceId,
    saveVideoInputDeviceId,
  } = usePersistentUserChoices({ preventSave: !saveUserChoices });

  const handleAudioDeviceChange = useCallback((deviceId) => {
    saveAudioInputDeviceId(deviceId ?? 
  - );
  }, [saveAudioInputDeviceId]);

  const handleVideoDeviceChange = useCallback((deviceId) => {
    saveVideoInputDeviceId(deviceId ??

const normalizeProps = (props) => {
  const { fontSize, color, icon, ...nextProps } = props;
  const sx = nextProps.sx ? { ...nextProps.sx } : {};

  // Handle fontSize
  if (typeof fontSize === 
  - ) {
    sx.fontSize = `${fontSize}px`;
  } else if (fontSize) {
    // If it
  - , 
  - , etc., MUI handles it via fontSize prop
    nextProps.fontSize = fontSize;
  }

  // Handle color if it
  -  || (typeof color === 
  -  && color.includes(
  - ))) {
    sx.color = color;
  } else if (color) {
    // MUI standard colors (primary, secondary, etc.)
    nextProps.color = color;
  }

  if (Object.keys(sx).length > 0) {
    nextProps.sx = sx;
  }

  return nextProps;
};

const FontAwesomeIcon = React.forwardRef(({ icon: Icon, ...props }, ref) => {
  if (!Icon) return null;
  const { fontSize, color, sx, style, className, ...rest } = props;

    <span
      ref={ref}
      className={className}
      style={{ display: 
  - , alignItems:

const createInitialExpanded = (items) => {
  const expanded = {};
  items.forEach((item) => {
    if (item.children && item.children.length) {
      expanded[item.id] = true;
    }
  });
  return expanded;
};

const MuiShellLayout = ({ title, navItems, children }) => {
  const location = useLocation();
  const { currentUser, isAuthenticated } = useSelector((state) => state.user);
  const [mobileOpen, setMobileOpen] = React.useState(false);
  const [expandedItems, setExpandedItems] = React.useState(() => createInitialExpanded(navItems));
  const [anchorElUser, setAnchorElUser] = React.useState(null);

  const handleDrawerToggle = () => {
    setMobileOpen(!mobileOpen);
  };

  const handleToggleGroup = (id) => {
    setExpandedItems((prev) => ({ ...prev, [id]: !prev[id] }));
  };

  const handleOpenUserMenu = (event) => {
    setAnchorElUser(event.currentTarget);
  };

  const handleCloseUserMenu = () => {
    setAnchorElUser(null);
  };

  const renderNavItems = (items, isChild = false) =>
    items.map((item) => {
      if (item.type === 
  - ) {
        return (
          <ListItem key={item.id} disablePadding>
            <ListItemButton onClick={() => handleToggleGroup(item.id)}>
              {item.icon ? (
                <ListItemIcon>
                  <item.icon fontSize=
  -  />
                </ListItemIcon>
              ) : null}
              <ListItemText
                primary={item.label}
                primaryTypographyProps={{ variant: 
  - , fontWeight: 600 }}
              />
              {expandedItems[item.id] ? <ExpandLessIcon fontSize=
  -  /> : <ExpandMoreIcon fontSize=
  -  />}
            </ListItemButton>
          </ListItem>
        );
      }

      if (item.children && item.children.length) {
        return (
          <Box key={item.id}>
            <ListItem disablePadding>
              <ListItemButton onClick={() => handleToggleGroup(item.id)}>
                {item.icon ? (
                  <ListItemIcon>
                    <item.icon fontSize=
  -  />
                  </ListItemIcon>
                ) : null}
                <ListItemText primary={item.label} primaryTypographyProps={{ variant: 
  -  }} />
                {expandedItems[item.id] ? <ExpandLessIcon fontSize=
  -  /> : <ExpandMoreIcon fontSize=
  -  />}
              </ListItemButton>
            </ListItem>
            <Collapse in={expandedItems[item.id]} timeout=
  -  unmountOnExit>
              <List component=
  -  disablePadding>
                {renderNavItems(item.children, true)}
              </List>
            </Collapse>
          </Box>
        );
      }

      return (
        <ListItem key={item.id} disablePadding>
          <ListItemButton
            component={item.to ? NavLink : 
  - }
            to={item.to || 
  - }
            selected={Boolean(item.to && location.pathname === item.to)}
            sx={{ pl: isChild ? 4 : 2 }}
          >
            {item.icon && !isChild ? (
              <ListItemIcon>
                <item.icon fontSize=
  -  />
              </ListItemIcon>
            ) : null}
            <ListItemText primary={item.label} primaryTypographyProps={{ variant: 
  -  }} />
          </ListItemButton>
        </ListItem>
      );
    });

  const drawer = (

const AccountSwitchMenu = ({ isShowButton = false }) => {
  const hostName = window.location.hostname;

  const handleClick = () => {
    switch(hostName) {
      case HOST_NAME.MYJOB:
        window.open(buildURL(HOST_NAME.EMPLOYER_MYJOB), 
  - );
        break;
      case HOST_NAME.EMPLOYER_MYJOB:
        window.open(buildURL(HOST_NAME.MYJOB), 
  - );
        break;
      default:
        window.open(buildURL(HOST_NAME.MYJOB), 
  - );
    }
  };

  const handleClickAuth = (isLogin = false) => {
    const path = isLogin ? ROUTES.AUTH.LOGIN : ROUTES.AUTH.REGISTER;

    switch(hostName) {
      case HOST_NAME.MYJOB:
        window.open(`${buildURL(HOST_NAME.EMPLOYER_MYJOB)}/${path}`, 
  - );
        break;
      case HOST_NAME.EMPLOYER_MYJOB:
        window.open(`${buildURL(HOST_NAME.MYJOB)}/${path}`, 
  - );
        break;
      default:
        window.open(`${buildURL(HOST_NAME.MYJOB)}/${path}`, 
  - );
    }
  }

    return hostName === HOST_NAME.MYJOB ? (
      <Stack direction=
  -  alignItems=
  - >
        <FontAwesomeIcon
          color=

          fontSize={25}
          style={{ marginRight: 8 }}
        />

  - >
          <Typography>For Employers</Typography>
          <Typography variant=

          color=

          icon={faUsers}
          fontSize={25}
          style={{ marginRight: 8 }}
        />
        <Stack direction=
  - >
          <Typography>For Job Seekers</Typography>
          <Typography variant=
  -  sx={{ fontSize: 11 }}>
            <FontAwesomeIcon icon={faArrowRight} /> Switch

  - >

  -

          fontSize={25}
          style={{ marginRight: 8 }}

          </Typography>
        </Stack>
      </Stack>

  - ;
import React from 
  - ;
import { Link, NavLink, useNavigate } from 
  - ;
import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 
  - ;

import { confirmModal } from 
  - ;
import errorHandling from 
  - ;

import { IMAGES, ROUTES } from 
  - ;
import { removeUserInfo } from 
  - ;
import tokenService from 
  - ;
import AccountSwitchMenu from 
  - ;
import {
  resetSearchCompany,
  resetSearchJobPostFilter,
  resetSearchResume,
} from 
  - ;

const drawerWidth = 240;

const LeftDrawer = ({ window, pages, mobileOpen, handleDrawerToggle }) => {
  const dispatch = useDispatch();
  const nav = useNavigate();
  const theme = useTheme();

  const { isAuthenticated } = useSelector((state) => state.user);

  const container =
    window !== undefined ? () => window().document.body : undefined;

  const handleLogout = () => {
    const accessToken = tokenService.getAccessTokenFromCookie();
    const backend = tokenService.getProviderFromCookie();
    dispatch(removeUserInfo({ accessToken, backend }))
      .unwrap()
      .then(() => {
        dispatch(resetSearchJobPostFilter());
        dispatch(resetSearchCompany());
        dispatch(resetSearchResume());

        nav(`/${ROUTES.AUTH.LOGIN}`);
      })
      .catch((error) => {
        errorHandling(error);
      });
  };

  const drawer = (
    <Box onClick={handleDrawerToggle} sx={{ textAlign:

const SubHeaderDialog = ({ open, setOpen, topCareers, handleFilter }) => {

  const { allConfig } = useSelector((state) => state.config);

  const theme = useTheme();

  const fullScreen = useMediaQuery(theme.breakpoints.down(
  - ));



  const customCareers = (allCareers, topCareers) => {

    var topCarrersId = topCareers.map((value) => value.id);

    var careerResult = [];



    for (let i = 0; i < (allConfig?.careerOptions || []).length; i++) {

      if (topCarrersId.includes(allConfig?.careerOptions[i].id)) {

        careerResult.push({ ...allConfig?.careerOptions[i], isHot: true });

      } else {

        careerResult.push({ ...allConfig?.careerOptions[i], isHot: false });

      }

    }

    return careerResult;

  };



  const careers = React.useMemo(

    () => customCareers(allConfig?.careerOptions || [], topCareers),

    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps

    [topCareers]

  );



  return (

    <Dialog

      PaperProps={{

        sx: {

          top: window.document.getElementById(
  - )?.clientHeight,

          position: 
  - ,

        },

      }}

      hideBackdrop={true}

      fullScreen

      open={open}

      onClose={() => setOpen(false)}

    >

      <Container maxWidth=

const RenderItem = ({ item }) => {
  const [location, setLocation] = React.useState({
    position: 
  - ,
    left: 10,
    bottom: 20,
    right: null,
    top: null,
  });

  React.useMemo(() => {
    switch (item.descriptionLocation) {
      case 1:
        setLocation({
          position: 
  - ,
          left: 10,
          bottom: null,
          right: null,
          top: 20,
        });
        break;
      case 2:
        setLocation({
          position: 
  - ,
          left: null,
          bottom: null,
          right: 10,
          top: 20,
        });
        break;
      case 3:
        setLocation({
          position: 
  - ,
          left: 10,
          bottom: 20,
          right: null,
          top: null,
        });
        break;
      case 4:
        setLocation({
          position: 
  - ,
          left: null,
          bottom: 20,
          right: 10,
          top: null,
        });
        break;
      default:
        break;
    }
  }, [item]);

  return (
    <MuiImageCustom
      width=
  - 
      height={320}
      src={item.imageUrl}
      sx={{
        borderRadius: 1.5,
      }}
      fit=
  - 
    />
  );
};

import { Link, useNavigate } from 
  - ;
import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 
  - ;
import { Button, Menu, Stack, Typography } from 
  - ;
import LogoutIcon from 
  - ;

  - ;

  - ;

import { removeUserInfo } from 
  - ;

import { ROLES_NAME, ROUTES } from 
  - ;
import tokenService from 
  - ;
import {
  resetSearchCompany,
  resetSearchJobPostFilter,
  resetSearchResume,
} from 
  - ;

const jobSeekerUserMenu = [
  {
    label: 
  - ,
    path: ROUTES.JOB_SEEKER.DASHBOARD,
  },
];

const employerUserMenu = [
  {
    label: 
  - ,
    path: ROUTES.EMPLOYER.DASHBOARD,
  },
];

const UserMenu = ({ anchorElUser, open, handleCloseUserMenu }) => {
  const nav = useNavigate();
  const dispatch = useDispatch();
  const { currentUser } = useSelector((state) => state.user);

  const menuItems = React.useMemo(() => {
    return currentUser.roleName === ROLES_NAME.JOB_SEEKER
      ? jobSeekerUserMenu
      : currentUser.roleName === ROLES_NAME.EMPLOYER
      ? employerUserMenu
      : [];
  }, [currentUser]);

  const handleLogout = () => {
    const accessToken = tokenService.getAccessTokenFromCookie();
    const backend = tokenService.getProviderFromCookie();
    dispatch(removeUserInfo({ accessToken, backend }))
      .unwrap()
      .then(() => {
        dispatch(resetSearchJobPostFilter());
        dispatch(resetSearchCompany());
        dispatch(resetSearchResume());

        nav(`/${ROUTES.AUTH.LOGIN}`);
      })
      .catch((error) => {
        errorHandling(error);
      });
  };

  return (
    <Menu
      anchorEl={anchorElUser}
      id=
  - 
      open={open}
      onClose={handleCloseUserMenu}
      PaperProps={{
        elevation: 0,
        sx: {
          overflow: 
  - ,
          filter: 
  - ,
          mt: 1.5,
          
  - : {
            width: 32,
            height: 32,
            ml: -0.5,
            mr: 1,
          },
          
  - : {
            content: 
  - ,
            display: 
  - ,
            position: 
  - ,
            top: 0,
            right: 14,
            width: 10,
            height: 10,
            bgcolor: 
  - ,
            transform: 
  - ,
            zIndex: 0,
          },
        },
      }}
      transformOrigin={{ horizontal: 
  - , vertical: 
  -  }}
      anchorOrigin={{ horizontal: 
  - , vertical: 
  -  }}
    >
      <Stack spacing={1} sx={{ p: 1 }}>
        {menuItems.map((item) => (
          <Link to={`/${item.path}`} key={item.path}>
            <Button
              color=
  - 
              variant=
  - 
              sx={{ textTransform: 
  -  }}
              fullWidth
            >
              <Typography marginRight=
  - > {item.label}</Typography>
            </Button>
          </Link>
        ))}
        <Button
          startIcon={<LogoutIcon style={{ marginLeft: 4 }} />}
          variant=
  - 
          color=
  - 
          sx={{ textTransform: 
  -  }}
          fullWidth
          onClick={() => {
            handleCloseUserMenu();
            confirmModal(
              handleLogout,
              
  - ,
              
  - ,
              
  - 
            );
          }}
        >
          <Typography marginRight=

    },
  },

    color: 
  - ,
  },
  
  - : {
    color: 
  - ,
  },
  
  - : {
    backgroundColor: theme.palette.primary.background,
    color: theme.palette.primary.main,
    fontWeight: 600,
    
  - : {
      backgroundColor: theme.palette.primary.background,
      color: theme.palette.primary.main,
    },
  },
}));

const MenuItem = ({ icon: Icon, text, to, onClick, isSelected, isExpanded, hasChildren, isChild }) => {
  return (
    <StyledListItemButton
      component={to ? NavLink : 
  - }
      to={to}
      onClick={onClick}
      selected={isSelected}
      sx={{
        pl: isChild ? 3 : 2,
        ...(hasChildren ? {} : { 
  - : { ml: 0 } })
      }}
    >
      {!isChild && Icon && (
        <ListItemIcon sx={{ minWidth: 35 }}>
          <Icon fontSize=
  -  />
        </ListItemIcon>
      )}
      {isChild && (
        <Box
          sx={{
            width: 4,
            height: 4,
            borderRadius: 
  - ,
            backgroundColor: 
  - ,
            mr: 1.5,
            ml: 1,
          }}
        />
      )}
      <ListItemText
        primary={text}
        primaryTypographyProps={{
          variant: 
  - ,
          fontSize: 
  - ,
        }}
      />
      {hasChildren && (
        <Box component=
  -  sx={{ ml: 
  -  }}>
          {isExpanded ? (
            <ArrowDropDownIcon fontSize=
  -  />
          ) : (
            <ArrowRightIcon fontSize=
  -  />
          )}
        </Box>
      )}
    </StyledListItemButton>
  );
};

const DrawerContent = ({ isAdmin }) => {
  const location = useLocation();
  const theme = useTheme();
  const [expandedItems, setExpandedItems] = useState({
    candidates: true,
    interviews: true,
    account: true,
    system: true,
    categories: true,
    profiles: true,
    recruitment: true,
  });

  const handleExpand = (section) => {
    setExpandedItems(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      [section]: !prev[section]
    }));
  };

  return (
    <div>
      <Toolbar sx={{ px: 2, py: 1.5 }}>
        <Box
          component={Link}
          to={`/${isAdmin ? ROUTES.ADMIN.DASHBOARD : ROUTES.EMPLOYER.DASHBOARD}`}
          sx={{
            width:

            display: 
  - ,
            justifyContent: 
  - 
          }}

          <Avatar
            src={IMAGES.getTextLogo(
              theme.palette.mode === 
  -  ? 
  -  : 
  - 
            )}
            sx={{
              height: 48,
              width: 
  - ,
            }}
            variant=
  - 
            alt=
  - 
          />
        </Box>
      </Toolbar>
      <Divider sx={{ borderColor: 
  -  }} />
      <Box sx={{ px: 1.5, py: 1.5 }}>
        <List component=
  -  disablePadding>
          {isAdmin ? (

              {/* Dashboard */}

                  icon={GridViewIcon}
                  text=

                  isSelected={location.pathname === `/${ROUTES.ADMIN.DASHBOARD}`}
                />
              </ListItem>

              {/* System & Users */}
              <ListItem disablePadding>

const TabBar = () => {

  - , 
  - ]);

    },
  ];

    location.pathname.includes(tab.path)
  );

  const [value, setValue] = React.useState(activeTabIndex);

  React.useEffect(() => {
    setValue(activeTabIndex);
  }, [activeTabIndex]);

  const handleChange = (event, newValue) => {
    setValue(newValue);
  };

  return (
    <Box
      sx={{
        width: 
  - ,
        px: 5,

        backgroundColor: (theme) => theme.palette.grey[50],

const drawerWidth = 240;

function EmployerLayout(props) {

  const [mobileOpen, setMobileOpen] = React.useState(false);

  const handleDrawerToggle = () => {
    setMobileOpen(!mobileOpen);
  };

  const container =
    window !== undefined ? () => window().document.body : undefined;

  return (
    <Box sx={{ display: 
  -  }}>
