const JobSeekerLogin = () => {
  const { t } = useTranslation(
  - );
  TabTitle(t(
  - ));

  const dispatch = useDispatch();
  const nav = useNavigate();
  const [searchParams] = useSearchParams();
  const [isFullScreenLoading, setIsFullScreenLoading] = React.useState(false);
  const [errorMessage, setErrorMessage] = React.useState(null);
  const [successMessage, setSuccessMessage] = React.useState(null);

  React.useEffect(() => {
    const successMsg = searchParams.get(
  - );
    const errorMsg = searchParams.get(
  - );

    if (successMsg !== null) {
      setSuccessMessage(successMsg);
    }

    setErrorMessage(errorMsg);
  }, [searchParams]);

  const handleLogin = (data) => {
    const getAccesToken = async (email, password, roleName) => {
      setIsFullScreenLoading(true);

      try {
        const resData = await authService.getToken(email, password, roleName);
        const {
          access_token: accessToken,
          refresh_token: refreshToken,
          backend,
        } = resData;

        const isSaveTokenToCookie =
          tokenService.saveAccessTokenAndRefreshTokenToCookie(
            accessToken,
            refreshToken,
            backend
          );
        if (isSaveTokenToCookie) {
          dispatch(getUserInfo())
            .unwrap()
            .then(() => {
              nav(
  - );
            })
            .catch(() => {
              toastMessages.error(t(
  - ));
            });
        } else {
          toastMessages.error(t(
  - ));
        }
      } catch (error) {
        const res = error.response;
        if (res.status === 400) {
          const errors = res?.errors;
          if (
  -  in errors) {
            setErrorMessage(errors.errorMessage.join(
  - ));
          } else {
            toastMessages.error(t(
  - ));
          }
        }
      } finally {
        setIsFullScreenLoading(false);
      }
    };

    const checkCreds = async (email, password, roleName) => {
      setIsFullScreenLoading(true);

      try {
        const resData = await authService.checkCreds(email, roleName);

        const { exists, email: resEmail, email_verified } = resData;
        if (exists === true && email_verified === false) {
          dispatch(
            updateVerifyEmail({
              isAllowVerifyEmail: true,
              email: email,
              roleName: roleName,
            })
          );
          nav(`/${ROUTES.AUTH.EMAIL_VERIFICATION}`);

          return;
        } else if (exists === false) {
          setErrorMessage(t(
  - ));

          return;
        }

        getAccesToken(resEmail, password, roleName);
      } catch (error) {
        toastMessages.error(t(
  - ));
      } finally {
        setIsFullScreenLoading(false);
      }
    };

    checkCreds(data.email, data.password, ROLES_NAME.JOB_SEEKER);
  };

  const handleSocialLogin = async (
    clientId,
    clientSecrect,
    provider,
    token
  ) => {
    setIsFullScreenLoading(true);

    try {
      const resData = await authService.convertToken(
        clientId,
        clientSecrect,
        provider,
        token
      );
      const {
        access_token: accessToken,
        refresh_token: refreshToken,
        backend,
      } = resData;

      const isSaveTokenToCookie =
        tokenService.saveAccessTokenAndRefreshTokenToCookie(
          accessToken,
          refreshToken,
          backend
        );
      if (isSaveTokenToCookie) {
        dispatch(getUserInfo())
          .unwrap()
          .then(() => {
            nav(
  - );
          })
          .catch(() => {
            toastMessages.error(t(
  - ));
          });
      } else {
        toastMessages.error(t(
  - ));
      }
    } catch (error) {
      const res = error.response;
      if (res.status === 400) {
        const errors = res?.errors;
        if (
  -  in errors) {
          setErrorMessage(errors.errorMessage.join(
  - ));
        } else {
          toastMessages.error(t(
  - ));
        }
      }
    } finally {
      setIsFullScreenLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleFacebookLogin = (result) => {
    const accessToken = result?.data?.accessToken;
    if (accessToken) {
      handleSocialLogin(
        AUTH_CONFIG.FACEBOOK_CLIENT_ID,
        AUTH_CONFIG.FACEBOOK_CLIENT_SECRET,
        AUTH_PROVIDER.FACEBOOK,
        accessToken
      );
    }
  };

  const handleGoogleLogin = (result) => {
    const code = result?.code;
    if (code) {
      handleSocialLogin(
        AUTH_CONFIG.GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID,
        AUTH_CONFIG.GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET,
        AUTH_PROVIDER.GOOGLE,
        code
      );
    }
  };

  return (
    <>
      <Container
        maxWidth=
  - 
        sx={{
          marginTop: { xs: 0, sm: 2, md: 3 },
          p: { xs: 0, sm: 3 },
          display: 
  - ,
          flexDirection: 
  - ,
          alignItems: 
  - ,
          justifyContent: 
  - ,
        }}
      >
        <StyledCard sx={{
          p: { xs: 2, sm: 4, md: 5 },
          width: 
  - ,
          borderRadius: { xs: 0, sm: 
  -  },
          boxShadow: { xs: 
  - , sm: 
  -  },
        }}>
          <Box
            sx={{
              display: 
  - ,
              flexDirection: 
  - ,
              alignItems: 
  - ,
              mb: 4,
            }}
          >
            <StyledAvatar>
              <LockOutlinedIcon sx={{ fontSize: 28 }} />
            </StyledAvatar>
            <Typography
              component=
  - 
              variant=
  - 
              align=
  - 
              sx={{
                fontWeight: 600,
                color: 
  - ,
                mb: 1
              }}
            >
              {t(
  - )}
            </Typography>
            <Typography
              variant=
  - 
              align=
  - 
              sx={{
                color: 
  - ,
                mb: 2
              }}
            >
              {t(
  - )}
            </Typography>
          </Box>

          {errorMessage && (
            <Alert
              severity=
  - 
              sx={{
                mb: 3,
                borderRadius: 
  - ,
              }}

              <AlertTitle>{t(
  - )}</AlertTitle>
              {errorMessage}

const JobSeekerSignUp = () => {
  const { t } = useTranslation(
  - );
  TabTitle(t(
  - ));

  const dispatch = useDispatch();
  const nav = useNavigate();
  const [isFullScreenLoading, setIsFullScreenLoading] = React.useState(false);
  const [serverErrors, setServerErrors] = React.useState({});

  const handleRegister = (data) => {
    const register = async (data, roleName) => {
      setIsFullScreenLoading(true);

      try {
        await authService.jobSeekerRegister(data);

        dispatch(
          updateVerifyEmail({
            isAllowVerifyEmail: true,
            email: data?.email,
            roleName: roleName,
          })
        );
        nav(`/${ROUTES.AUTH.EMAIL_VERIFICATION}`);
      } catch (error) {
        errorHandling(error);
      } finally {
        setIsFullScreenLoading(false);
      }
    };

    register({ ...data, platform: PLATFORM }, ROLES_NAME.JOB_SEEKER);
  };

  const handleSocialRegister = async (
    clientId,
    clientSecrect,
    provider,
    token

        clientId,

        provider,

        refresh_token: refreshToken,
        backend,
      } = resData;

      const isSaveTokenToCookie =
        authService.saveAccessTokenAndRefreshTokenToCookie(
          accessToken,
          refreshToken,
          backend
        );
      if (isSaveTokenToCookie) {
        dispatch(getUserInfo())
          .unwrap()
          .then(() => {
            nav(
  - );
          })
          .catch(() => {
            errorHandling();

const InterviewRoomPage = () => {
  const { id: inviteToken } = useParams();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const { t } = useTranslation(
  - );

  const [token, setToken] = useState(
  - );
  const [error, setError] = useState(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  const liveKitUrl = import.meta.env.VITE_LIVEKIT_URL || 
  - ;

  useEffect(() => {
    const fetchToken = async () => {
      try {
        setLoading(true);
        const data = await interviewService.getLiveKitTokenByInviteToken(inviteToken);

        if (data?.token) {
          setToken(data.token);
        } else {
          setError(t(
  - ));
        }
      } catch (err) {
        console.error(
  - , err);
        setError(t(
  - ));
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };

    if (inviteToken) {
      fetchToken();
    } else {
      setError(t(
  - ));
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [inviteToken, t]);

  const handleBackHome = () => {
    navigate(
  - );
  };

  const tokenSource = useMemo(() => {
    if (!token) return null;
    return TokenSource.literal({
      serverUrl: liveKitUrl,
      participantToken: token,
    });
  }, [token, liveKitUrl]);

    () => ({
      ...APP_CONFIG_DEFAULTS,
      pageTitle: t(
  - ),
      pageDescription: t(
  - ),
      companyName: t(
  - ),
      startButtonText: t(
  - ),
    }),
    [t]
  );

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <Box
        sx={{
          display: 
  - ,
          height: 
  - ,
          alignItems: 
  - ,
          justifyContent: 
  - ,
          flexDirection: 
  - ,
          gap: 2,
          bgcolor: 
  - ,
          color: 
  - ,
        }}
      >
        <CircularProgress />
        <Typography>{t(
  - )}</Typography>
      </Box>
    );
  }

  if (error) {
    return (
      <Box
        sx={{
          minHeight: 
  - ,
          display: 
  - ,
          alignItems: 
  - ,
          justifyContent: 
  - ,
          bgcolor: 
  - ,
        }}
      >
        <Container maxWidth=
  - >
          <Paper
            sx={{
              p: 4,
              textAlign: 
  - ,
              bgcolor: 
  - ,
              color: 
  - ,
              borderRadius: 3,
              border: 
  - ,
            }}
          >
            <Alert severity=
  -  variant=
  -  sx={{ mb: 3 }}>
              {error}
            </Alert>
            <Button variant=
  -  onClick={handleBackHome}>
              {t(
  - )}
            </Button>
          </Paper>
        </Container>
      </Box>
    );

    return null;

  return (
    <Box sx={{ height: 
  - , width: 
  - , bgcolor: 
  -  }}>
      <ThemeProvider attribute=
  -  defaultTheme=
  -  enableSystem>
        <VoiceAiApp
          appConfig={appConfig}
          tokenSource={tokenSource}
          startAudioLabel={t(

const AccountCard = ({ title, sx }) => {

  const dispatch = useDispatch();

  const nav = useNavigate();

  const [openPopup, setOpenPopup] = React.useState(false);

  const [isFullScreenLoading, setIsFullScreenLoading] = React.useState(false);

  const [serverErrors, setServerErrors] = React.useState(null);



  const handleUpdateAccount = (data) => {

    dispatch(updateUserInfo(data))

      .unwrap()

      .then(() =>

        toastMessages.success(
  - )

      )

      .catch((error) => {

        errorHandling(error, setServerErrors);

      });

  };



  const handleUpdatePassword = (data) => {

    const update = async (data) => {

      setIsFullScreenLoading(true);

      try {

        await authService.changePassword(data);



        setOpenPopup(false);

        toastMessages.success(
  - );



        let path = ROUTES.AUTH.LOGIN;

        const accessToken = tokenService.getAccessTokenFromCookie();

        const backend = tokenService.getProviderFromCookie();

        dispatch(removeUserInfo({ accessToken, backend }))

          .unwrap()

          .then(() => {

            nav(path);

          })

          .catch((err) => {

            toastMessages.error(
  - );

          });

      } catch (error) {

        errorHandling(error, setServerErrors);

      } finally {

        setIsFullScreenLoading(false);

      }

    };



    update(data);

  };

          background:

  -  }} />

  - ,

  - ,

const AvatarCard = () => {
  const dispatch = useDispatch();
  const { currentUser } = useSelector((state) => state.user);
  const [isFullScreenLoading, setIsFullScreenLoading] = React.useState(false);
  const fileInputRef = React.useRef(null);

  const handleUpload = async (file) => {
    const formData = new FormData();
    formData.append(
  - , file);

    setIsFullScreenLoading(true);

    dispatch(updateAvatar(formData))
      .unwrap()
      .then(() => {
        toastMessages.success(
  - );
      })
      .catch(() => {
        toastMessages.error(
  - );
      })
      .finally(() => setIsFullScreenLoading(false));
  };

  const handleDelete = () => {
    const del = async () => {
      setIsFullScreenLoading(true);

      dispatch(deleteAvatar())
        .unwrap()
        .then(() => {
          toastMessages.success(
  - );
        })
        .catch(() => {
          toastMessages.error(
  - );
        })
        .finally(() => setIsFullScreenLoading(false));
    };

    confirmModal(
      () => del(),
      
  - ,
      
  - ,
      
  - 
    );
  };

  const handlePickFile = () => {
    fileInputRef.current?.click();
  };

  const handleFileChange = (event) => {
    const file = event.target.files?.[0];
    if (!file) return;
    handleUpload(file);
    event.target.value = 
  - ;
  };

    <>
      <Stack alignItems=
  - >
        <Box
          sx={{
            position: 
  - ,
            width: 120,

  - ,

  - ,

  - ,

              opacity: 1,
            },
          }}
        >
          <MuiImageCustom
            src={currentUser?.avatarUrl}
            width=
  - 
            height=
  - 
            sx={{
              borderRadius: 
  - ,
              objectFit: 
  - ,
              border: 
  - ,
            }}
          />

          <Box
            className=
  - 
            sx={{
              position: 
  - ,
              top: 0,
              left: 0,
              right: 0,
              bottom: 0,
              borderRadius: 
  - ,
              backgroundColor: 
  - ,
              display: 
  - ,
              justifyContent: 
  - ,
              alignItems: 
  - ,
              opacity: 0,
              transition: 
  - ,
            }}
          >
            <Stack direction=
  -  spacing={1}>
              <IconButton
                size=
  - 
                sx={{
                  bgcolor: 
  - ,
                  
  - : { bgcolor: 
  - , opacity: 0.9 },
                }}
                onClick={handlePickFile}
              >
                <ModeEditOutlineOutlinedIcon sx={{ fontSize: 18, color:

import { useSelector } from 
  - ;

import {

  Box,

  - ;

  - ;



import {

  collection,

  onSnapshot,

  query,

  where,

  orderBy,

  startAfter,

  limit,

  getDocs,

  doc,

  updateDoc,

} from 
  - ;

import db from 
  - ;

import { ChatContext } from 
  - ;

import Message from 
  - ;

import { ROLES_NAME } from 
  - ;

import {

  addDocument,

  getChatRoomById,

  updateChatRoomByPartnerId,

const LIMIT = 20;

const messageCollectionRef = collection(db, 
  - );



const ChatWindow = () => {

  const { currentUser } = useSelector((state) => state.user);

  const { currentUserChat, selectedRoomId } = React.useContext(ChatContext);

  const inputRef = React.useRef(null);

  const messageListRef = React.useRef(null);

  const [inputValue, setInputValue] = React.useState(
  - );



  const [selectedRoom, setSelectedRoom] = React.useState({});

  const [partnerId, setPartnerId] = React.useState(null);

  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = React.useState(true);

  const [hasMore, setHasMore] = React.useState(true);

  const [lastDocument, setLastDocument] = React.useState(null);

  const [messages, setMessages] = React.useState([]);

  const [page, setPage] = React.useState(1);

  const [count, setCount] = React.useState(0);



  // cap nhat unreadCount

  React.useEffect(() => {

    if (selectedRoomId && currentUserChat) {

      const chatRoomDocRef = doc(db, 
  - , `${selectedRoomId}`);



      const unsub = onSnapshot(chatRoomDocRef, (doc) => {

        const { recipientId, unreadCount } = doc.data();



        if (recipientId === `${currentUserChat.userId}` && unreadCount > 0) {

          updateDoc(chatRoomDocRef, {

            unreadCount: 0,

          })

            .then(() => {

              console.log(
  - );

            })

            .catch((error) => {

              console.log(

                
  - ,

                error

              );

            });

        }

      });



      return () => unsub();

    }

  }, [currentUserChat, selectedRoomId]);



  // lay thong tin partner

  React.useEffect(() => {

    const getChatRoom = async (selectedRoomId, userId) => {

      const selectRoom = await getChatRoomById(selectedRoomId, userId);



      setSelectedRoom(selectRoom);

      setPartnerId(selectRoom?.user?.userId);

    };

    if (selectedRoomId && currentUserChat) {

      getChatRoom(selectedRoomId, currentUserChat.userId);

    }

  }, [selectedRoomId, currentUserChat]);



  // lang nghe tong message

  React.useEffect(() => {

    if (selectedRoomId) {

      const q = query(

        messageCollectionRef,

        where(
  - , 
  - , `${selectedRoomId}`)

      );



      const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(q, async (querySnapshot) => {

        setCount(querySnapshot?.size || 0);

      });



      return () => {

        unsubscribe();

      };

    }



    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps

  }, [selectedRoomId]);



  // danh sach messages

  React.useEffect(() => {

    setIsLoading(true);



    let q = query(

      messageCollectionRef,

      where(
  - , 
  - , `${selectedRoomId}`),

      orderBy(
  - , 
  - ),

      limit(LIMIT)

    );



    const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(q, (querySnapshot) => {

      const messagesData = querySnapshot.docs.map((doc) => ({

        ...doc.data(),

        id: doc.id,

      }));



      if (querySnapshot.docs.length > 0) {

        setLastDocument(querySnapshot.docs[querySnapshot.docs.length - 1]);

      }



      setMessages(messagesData);

      setPage(1);

      setHasMore(true);

      setIsLoading(false);

    });



    return () => unsubscribe();



    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps

  }, [selectedRoomId]);



  // tai them du lieu

  const handleLoadMore = () => {

    const getMoreData = async () => {

      if (lastDocument !== null) {

        const q = query(

          messageCollectionRef,

          where(
  - , 
  - , `${selectedRoomId}`),

          orderBy(
  - , 
  - ),

          startAfter(lastDocument),

          limit(LIMIT)

        );



        const querySnapshot = await getDocs(q);

        if (querySnapshot.docs.length > 0) {

          setLastDocument(querySnapshot.docs[querySnapshot.docs.length - 1]);

        }

        const messagesData = querySnapshot.docs.map((doc) => ({

          ...doc.data(),

          id: doc.id,

        }));



        setMessages([...messages, ...messagesData]);

      }

    };



    if (Math.ceil(count / LIMIT) > page) {

      setPage(page + 1);

      getMoreData();

    } else {

      setHasMore(false);

    }

  };



  const handleInputChange = (e) => {

    setInputValue(e.target.value);

  };



  const handleOnSubmit = (e) => {

    e.preventDefault();



    if (inputValue.trim() !== 
  - ) {

      // them message

      addDocument(
  - , {

        text: inputValue,

        userId: `${currentUserChat?.userId}`,

        roomId: selectedRoomId,

      });



      // cap nhat chat room

      updateChatRoomByPartnerId(partnerId, selectedRoomId);



      setInputValue(
  - );



      if (inputRef?.current) {

        setTimeout(() => {

          inputRef.current.focus();

        });

      }

    }

  };



  const handleKeyDown = (event) => {

    if (event.key === 
  -  && event.shiftKey === false) {

      event.preventDefault();

      handleOnSubmit(event);

    }

  };



  React.useEffect(() => {

    // scroll to bottom after message changed

    if (messageListRef?.current) {

      messageListRef.current.scrollTop =

        messageListRef.current.scrollHeight + 50;

    }

  }, [messages]);



  return (

    <Stack 

      direction=
  -  

      sx={{ 

        height: 
  - ,

        position: 
  - ,

        bgcolor: 
  - 

      }}

    >

      {selectedRoomId && (

        <Box

          sx={{

            position: 
  - ,

            top: 0,

            left: 0,

            right: 0,

            zIndex: 10,

            bgcolor: 
  - ,

            borderBottom: 1,

            borderColor: 
  - ,

          }}

        >

          <Stack>

            {currentUser?.roleName === ROLES_NAME.JOB_SEEKER ? (

              <ChatInfo.HeaderChatInfo

                avatarUrl={selectedRoom?.user?.avatarUrl}

                title={selectedRoom?.user?.name}

                subTitle={selectedRoom?.user?.company?.companyName}

              />

            ) : (

              <ChatInfo.HeaderChatInfo

                avatarUrl={selectedRoom?.user?.avatarUrl}

                title={selectedRoom?.user?.name}

                subTitle={selectedRoom?.user?.email}

              />

            )}

          </Stack>

        </Box>

      )}



      <Box 

        sx={{ 

          flexGrow: 1, 

          overflow: 
  - ,

          mt: selectedRoomId ? 
  -  : 0, // Chiều cao của header chat

          mb: 
  -  // Chiều cao của khung nhập tin nhắn

        }}

        {selectedRoomId ? (

          <Stack sx={{ height:

            <Box 

              sx={{

                position: 
  - 

              }}

            >

              {isLoading ? (

                <Stack

                  justifyContent=
  - 

                  alignItems=
  - 

                  height=
  - 

                >

                  <CircularProgress color=
  -  />

                </Stack>

              ) : messages.length === 0 ? (

                <Stack

                  justifyContent=
  -  

                  alignItems=
  - 

                  height=
  - 

                  p={2}

                >

                  {currentUser?.roleName === ROLES_NAME.JOB_SEEKER ? (

                    <ChatInfo

                      avatarUrl={selectedRoom?.user?.avatarUrl}

                      title={selectedRoom?.user?.name}

                      subTitle={selectedRoom?.user?.company?.companyName}

                      description={

                        selectedRoom?.createdBy !== `${currentUserChat?.userId}`

                          ? `${selectedRoom?.user?.company?.companyName} đã kết nối với bạn.`

                          : `Bạn đã kết nối đến ${selectedRoom?.user?.company?.companyName}`

const LeftSidebar = () => {

  const { currentUserChat, setSelectedRoomId } = React.useContext(ChatContext);

  const [searchText, setSearchText] = React.useState(
  - );

  const deboundedTextValue = useDebounce(searchText, 500);



  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = React.useState(true);

  const [hasMore, setHasMore] = React.useState(true);

  const [lastDocument, setLastDocument] = React.useState(null);

  const [chatRooms, setChatRooms] = React.useState([]);

  const [page, setPage] = React.useState(0);

  const [count, setCount] = React.useState(0);



  const handleSelectRoom = (chatRoom) => {

    setSelectedRoomId(chatRoom?.id);

  };



  React.useEffect(() => {

    console.log(
  - , deboundedTextValue);

  }, [deboundedTextValue]);



  // lang nghe tong chat rooms

  React.useEffect(() => {

    if (currentUserChat) {

      const q = query(

        chatRoomCollectionRef,

        where(
  - , 
  - , `${currentUserChat.userId}`)

      );



      const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(q, async (querySnapshot) => {

        setCount(querySnapshot?.size || 0);

      });



      return () => {

        unsubscribe();

      };

    }

  }, [currentUserChat]);



  // load danh sach chat rooms

  React.useEffect(() => {

    if (currentUserChat) {

      setIsLoading(true);



      let q = query(

        chatRoomCollectionRef,

        where(
  - , 
  - , `${currentUserChat.userId}`),

        orderBy(
  - , 
  - ),

        limit(LIMIT)

      );



      const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(q, async (querySnapshot) => {

        let chatRoomsData = [];



        const promises = querySnapshot.docs.map(async (doc) => {

          try {

            let partnerId = 
  - ;

            const chatRoomData = doc.data();



            if (chatRoomData?.members[0] === `${currentUserChat.userId}`) {

              partnerId = chatRoomData?.members[1];

            } else {

              partnerId = chatRoomData?.members[0];

            }



            const userAccount = await getUserAccount(

              
  - ,

              `${partnerId}`

            );



            chatRoomsData.push({

              ...chatRoomData,

              id: doc.id,

              user: userAccount,

            });

          } catch (error) {

            console.error(error);

          }

        });



        if (querySnapshot.docs.length > 0) {

          setLastDocument(querySnapshot.docs[querySnapshot.docs.length - 1]);

        }

        await Promise.all(promises);



        setChatRooms(chatRoomsData);

        setHasMore(true);

        setPage(1);

        setIsLoading(false);

      });



      return () => unsubscribe();

    }

    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps

  }, [currentUserChat]);



  // tai them du lieu

  const handleLoadMore = () => {

    const getMoreData = async () => {

      if (lastDocument !== null) {

        const q = query(

          chatRoomCollectionRef,

          where(
  - , 
  - , `${currentUserChat.userId}`),

          orderBy(
  - , 
  - ),

          startAfter(lastDocument),

          limit(LIMIT)

        );

        const querySnapshot = await getDocs(q);

        let chatRoomsData = [];

        if (querySnapshot.docs.length > 0) {

          setLastDocument(querySnapshot.docs[querySnapshot.docs.length - 1]);

        }

        const promises = querySnapshot.docs.map(async (doc) => {

          try {

            let partnerId = 
  - ;

            const chatRoomData = doc.data();

            if (chatRoomData?.members[0] === `${currentUserChat.userId}`) {

              partnerId = chatRoomData?.members[1];

            } else {

              partnerId = chatRoomData?.members[0];

            }

            const userAccount = await getUserAccount(

              
  - ,

              `${partnerId}`

            );

            chatRoomsData.push({

              ...chatRoomData,

              id: doc.id,

              user: userAccount,

            });

          } catch (error) {

            console.error(error);

          }

        });

        await Promise.all(promises);

        setChatRooms([...chatRooms, ...chatRoomsData]);

      }

    };

    if (Math.ceil(count / LIMIT) > page) {

      setPage(page + 1);

      getMoreData();

    } else {

      setHasMore(false);

    }

  };



  return (

    <Box>

      <Stack spacing={2}>

        <Box>

          <ChatRoomSearch

            value={searchText}

            setValue={setSearchText}

            placeholder=
  - 

          />

        </Box>

        <Box

          sx={{

            height: 
  - ,

          }}

        >

          {isLoading ? (

            <Stack spacing={2} overflow={
  - } height=
  - >

              {Array.from(Array(12).keys()).map((value) => (

                <LoadingComponentItem key={value} />

              ))}

            </Stack>

          ) : chatRooms.length === 0 ? (

            <NoDataCard

              title=
  - 

              imgComponentSgv={<SVG_IMAGES.ImageSvg15 />}

            />

          ) : (

            <Stack spacing={1}>

              <InfiniteScroll

                height={
  - }

                style={{

                  overflowY: 
  - ,

                }}

                dataLength={chatRooms.length}

                next={handleLoadMore}

                hasMore={hasMore}

                loader={

                  <Stack sx={{ py: 2 }} justifyContent=
  - >

                    <CircularProgress

                      color=
  - 

                      sx={{ margin: 
  -  }}

                    />

                  </Stack>

                }

              >

                {chatRooms.map((value) => (

                  <Stack

                    onClick={() => handleSelectRoom(value)}

                    direction=
  - 

                    spacing={1}

                    alignItems=
  - 

                    key={value.id}

                    sx={{

                      p: 1,

                      borderRadius: 2,

                      
  - : {

                        backgroundColor: 
  - ,

                      },

                    }}

                  >

                    <Box>

                      <MuiImageCustom

                        width={54}

                        height={54}

                        sx={{

                          borderRadius: 50,

                          border: 1,

                          borderColor: 
  - ,

                          p: 0.25,

                        }}

                        src={`${value?.user?.avatarUrl}`}

                      />

                    </Box>

                    <Stack flex={1} width={
  - }>

                      <span

                        style={{

                          fontWeight: 700,

                          fontSize: 15,

                          whiteSpace: 
  - ,

                          overflow: 
  - ,

                          textOverflow: 
  - ,

                          cursor: 
  - ,

                        }}

                      >

                        {`${value?.user?.name}`}

                      </span>



                      <Typography

                        variant=
  - 

                        sx={{

                          whiteSpace: 
  - ,

                          overflow: 
  - ,

                          textOverflow: 
  - ,

                          cursor: 
  - ,

                        }}

                      >

                        {`${value?.user?.company?.companyName}` || 
  - }

                      </Typography>

                    </Stack>

                    <Box>

                      {`${value?.recipientId}` ===

                        `${currentUserChat.userId}` &&

                        value?.unreadCount > 0 && (

                          <CircleIcon

                            style={{ color: 
  - , fontSize: 12 }}

                          />

                        )}

                    </Box>

                  </Stack>

                ))}

              </InfiniteScroll>

            </Stack>

          )}

        </Box>

      </Stack>

    </Box>

  );

};

              partnerId = chatRoomData?.members[1];

            } else {

              partnerId = chatRoomData?.members[0];

            }

            const userAccount = await getUserAccount(

              
  - ,

              `${partnerId}`

            );

            chatRoomsData.push({

              ...chatRoomData,

              id: doc.id,

              user: userAccount,

            });

          } catch (error) {

            console.error(error);

          }

        });

        await Promise.all(promises);

        setChatRooms([...chatRooms, ...chatRoomsData]);

      }

    };

    if (Math.ceil(count / LIMIT) > page) {

      setPage(page + 1);

      getMoreData();

    } else {

      setHasMore(false);

    }

  };

const RightSidebar = () => {

  const { setSelectedRoomId } = React.useContext(ChatContext);

  const { currentUser } = useSelector((state) => state.user);

  const { id: userId } = currentUser;

  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = React.useState(true);

  const [jobPostsApplied, setJobPostsApplied] = React.useState([]);

  const [page, setPage] = React.useState(1);

  const [count, setCount] = React.useState(0);



  React.useEffect(() => {

    const getJobPosts = async (params) => {

      setIsLoading(true);

      try {

        const resData = await jobPostActivityService.getJobPostChatActivity({

          page: page,

          pageSize: pageSize,

        });

        const data = resData.data;



        setCount(data.count);

        setJobPostsApplied(data.results);

      } catch (error) {

        console.log(error);

      } finally {

        setIsLoading(false);

      }

    };



    getJobPosts();

    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps

  }, [page]);



  const handleAddRoom = async (partnerId, userData) => {

    // kiem tra user nay da duoc tao account tren firestore

    let allowCreateNewChatRoom = false;

    const isExists = await checkExists(
  - , partnerId);

    if (!isExists) {

      // tao moi user tren firestore.

      const createResult = await createUser(
  - , userData, partnerId);

      if (createResult) {

        // tao phong tro chuyen

        allowCreateNewChatRoom = true;

      }

    } else {

      allowCreateNewChatRoom = true;

    }



    // tao phong tro chuyen

    if (allowCreateNewChatRoom) {

      // neu da ton tai phong co 2 user này => setSelectRoomID

      let chatRoomId = await checkChatRoomExists(

        
  - ,

        userId,

        partnerId

      );

      if (chatRoomId === null) {

        // neu chua ton tai thi tao phong moi

        chatRoomId = await addDocument(
  - , {

          members: [`${userId}`, `${partnerId}`],

          membersString: [`${userId}-${partnerId}`, `${partnerId}-${userId}`],

          recipientId: `${partnerId}`,

          createdBy: `${userId}`,

          unreadCount: 0

        });

      }



      // set phong hien tai voi chatRoomId

      setSelectedRoomId(chatRoomId);

    }

  };



  return (

    <Box>

      <Typography 

        variant=
  -  

        sx={{ 

          fontSize: 13,

          fontWeight: 700,

          color: 
  - ,

          letterSpacing: 
  - ,

          mb: 2

        }}

      >

        TIN TUYỂN DỤNG ĐÃ ỨNG TUYỂN

      </Typography>



      <Box 

        sx={{ 

          maxHeight: 
  - ,

          overflowY: 
  - ,

          pr: 1,

          
  - : {

            width: 
  - ,

          },

        }}

      >

        {isLoading ? (

          <Stack spacing={2}>

            {Array.from(Array(12).keys()).map((value) => (

              <LoadingComponentItem key={value} />

            ))}

          </Stack>

        ) : jobPostsApplied.length === 0 ? (

          <Stack 

            spacing={2} 

            alignItems=
  -  

            justifyContent=
  -  

            sx={{ 

              py: 8,

              px: 2,

              bgcolor: 
  - ,

              borderRadius: 2

            }}

          >

            <Empty description={

              <Typography variant=
  -  color=
  - >

                Bạn chưa ứng tuyển vị trí nào

              </Typography>

            } />

          </Stack>

        ) : (

          <Stack spacing={1.5}>

            {jobPostsApplied.map((value) => (

                key={value.id}

                sx={{

                  p: 1.5,

                  borderRadius: 2,

                  bgcolor: 
  - ,

                  transition: 
  - ,

                        variant=

const CategoryCard = ({ options, type }) => {

  const dispatch = useDispatch();

  const nav = useNavigate();

  const { jobPostFilter } = useSelector((state) => state.filter);

  const [items, setItems] = React.useState(options);



  const handleFilterChange = (value) => {

    let filterItems = options.filter((option) =>

      option.name.toLowerCase().includes(value.toLowerCase())

    );

    setItems(filterItems);

  };



  const handleFilter = (id) => {

    switch (type) {

      case 
  - :

        dispatch(searchJobPost({ ...jobPostFilter, careerId: id }));

        break;

      case 
  - :

        dispatch(searchJobPost({ ...jobPostFilter, cityId: id }));

        break;

      case 
  - :

        dispatch(searchJobPost({ ...jobPostFilter, jobTypeId: id }));

        break;

      default:

        break;

    }

    nav(`/${ROUTES.JOB_SEEKER.JOBS}`);

  };



  return (

    <Grid container spacing={2}>

      <Grid item xs={12}>

        <Paper

          component=
  - 

          sx={{

            boxShadow: 0,

            p: 
  - ,

            display: 
  - ,

            alignItems: 
  - ,

            width: 
  - ,

            backgroundColor: 
  - ,

            border: 1,

            borderColor: 
  - ,

            maxWidth: {

              xs: 
  - ,

              sm: 
  - ,

              md: 
  - ,

              lg: 
  - ,

              xl: 
  - ,

            },

            mb: 1,

          }}

        >

          <SearchIcon color=
  -  />

          <InputBase

            sx={{ ml: 1, flex: 1 }}

            inputProps={{ 
  - : 
  -  }}

            defaultValue=
  - 

            placeholder=
  - 

            onChange={(event) => handleFilterChange(event.target.value)}

          />

        </Paper>

      </Grid>

      {items.map((item) => (

        <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={4} lg={4} xl={3} key={item.id}>

          <Typography

            sx={{

              cursor: 
  - ,

              
  - : {

                color:

                fontWeight:

const pageSize = 12;

const FilterJobPostCard = ({ params = {}}) => {
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = React.useState(true);
  const [jobPosts, setJobPosts] = React.useState([]);
  const [page, setPage] = React.useState(1);
  const [count, setCount] = React.useState(0);
  const [parentWidth, setParentWidth] = React.useState(0);
  const [col, setCol] = React.useState(12);

  React.useEffect(() => {
    const handleResize = () => {
      const newWidth = document.getElementById(
        
  - 
      ).offsetWidth;
      setParentWidth(newWidth);
    };

    handleResize();

    window.addEventListener(
  - , handleResize);
    return () => window.removeEventListener(
  - , handleResize);
  }, []);

  React.useEffect(() => {
    if (parentWidth < 600) {
      setCol(12);
    } else if (parentWidth < 900) {
      setCol(6);
    } else if (parentWidth < 1200) {
      setCol(6);
    } else {
      setCol(4);
    }
  }, [parentWidth]);

  React.useEffect(() => {
    const getJobPosts = async (params) => {
      setIsLoading(true);
      try {
        const resData = await jobService.getJobPosts({
          ...params,
          pageSize: pageSize,
          page: page,
        });
        const data = resData.data;

        setCount(data.count);
        setJobPosts(data.results);
      } catch (error) {
      } finally {
        setIsLoading(false);
      }
    };

    getJobPosts(params);
    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  }, [page]);

  const handleChangePage = (event, newPage) => {
    setPage(newPage);
  };

  return (
    <div id=
  - >
      <Stack>
        {isLoading ? (
          <Grid container spacing={2}>
            {Array.from(Array(pageSize).keys()).map((item) => (
              <Grid key={item} item xs={col}>
                <JobPost.Loading></JobPost.Loading>
              </Grid>
            ))}
          </Grid>
        ) : jobPosts.length === 0 ? (
          <NoDataCard />
        ) : (
          <>
            <Grid container spacing={2}>
              {jobPosts.map((value) => (
                <Grid item xs={col} key={value.id}>
                  {/* Start: Job post */}
                  <JobPost
                    id={value.id}
                    slug={value.slug}
                    companyImageUrl={value?.companyDict?.companyImageUrl}
                    companyName={value?.companyDict?.companyName}
                    jobName={value?.jobName}
                    cityId={value?.locationDict?.city}
                    deadline={value?.deadline}
                    isUrgent={value?.isUrgent}
                    isHot={value?.isHot}
                    salaryMin={value.salaryMin}
                    salaryMax={value.salaryMax}
                  />
                  {/* End: Job post */}
                </Grid>
              ))}
            </Grid>
            <Stack sx={{mt: 4}}>
              {Math.ceil(count / pageSize) > 1 && (
                <Pagination
                  color=
  - 
                  size=
  - 
                  variant=
  - 
                  sx={{ margin:

  - );

          keywordListStr !== null &&

          keywordListStr !== undefined &&

          keywordListStr !== 
  -

  - ,

                JSON.stringify([

                  kw,

                  ...keywordList.slice(0, keywordList.length - 1),

              );

              localStorage.setItem(

                
  - ,

                JSON.stringify([kw, ...keywordList])

            }

          }

        } else {

          localStorage.setItem(
  - , JSON.stringify([kw]));

        }

      }

    } catch (error) {

      console.error(
  - , error);

    }

  };



  const handleFilter = (data) => {

    handleSaveKeyworLocalStorage(data?.kw);



    dispatch(searchJobPost(data));

    nav(`/${ROUTES.JOB_SEEKER.JOBS}`);

  };

  - :

const JobPostSearch = () => {

  const dispatch = useDispatch();

  const { allConfig } = useSelector((state) => state.config);

  const { jobPostFilter } = useSelector((state) => state.filter);

  const [showAdvanceFilter, setShowAdvanceFilter] = React.useState(false);



  const { control, handleSubmit, reset } = useForm();



  React.useEffect(() => {

    reset((formValues) => ({

      ...formValues,

      ...jobPostFilter,

    }));

  }, [jobPostFilter, reset]);



  const handleChangeShowFilter = () => {

    setShowAdvanceFilter(!showAdvanceFilter);

  };



  const handleSaveKeyworLocalStorage = (kw) => {

    try {

      if (kw) {

        const keywordListStr = localStorage.getItem(
  - );



        if (

          keywordListStr !== null &&

          keywordListStr !== undefined &&

          keywordListStr !== 
  - 

        ) {

          const keywordList = JSON.parse(keywordListStr);



          if (!keywordList.includes(kw)) {

            if (keywordList.length >= 5) {

              localStorage.setItem(

                
  - ,

                JSON.stringify([

                  kw,

                  ...keywordList.slice(0, keywordList.length - 1),

                ])

              );

            } else {

              localStorage.setItem(

                
  - ,

                JSON.stringify([kw, ...keywordList])

              );

            }

          }

        } else {

          localStorage.setItem(
  - , JSON.stringify([kw]));

        }

      }

    } catch (error) {

      console.error(
  - , error);

    }

  };



  const handleFilter = (data) => {

    handleSaveKeyworLocalStorage(data?.kw);



    dispatch(searchJobPost(data));

  };



  const handleReset = () => {

    dispatch(resetSearchJobPostFilter());

  };



  return (

    <Box component=
  -  onSubmit={handleSubmit(handleFilter)}>

      <Card sx={{ p: 3, boxShadow: 0, backgroundColor: 
  -  }}>

  -

const MainJobPostCard = () => {

  const { jobPostFilter } = useSelector((state) => state.filter);

  const { pageSize } = jobPostFilter;

  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = React.useState(true);

  const [jobPosts, setJobPosts] = React.useState([]);

  const [page, setPage] = React.useState(1);

  const [count, setCount] = React.useState(0);



  React.useEffect(() => {

    const getJobPosts = async () => {

      setIsLoading(true);

      try {

        const resData = await jobService.getJobPosts({

          ...jobPostFilter,

          page: page,

        });



        const data = resData.data;



        setCount(data.count);

        setJobPosts(data?.results || []);

      } catch (error) {

        console.error(error);

      } finally {

        setIsLoading(false);

      }

    };



    getJobPosts();

  }, [jobPostFilter, page]);

    setPage(newPage);

  - ,

              fontSize: 
  -

              <JobPostLarge.Loading />

            </Box>

  - 

    );

  - , 
  - , false));

      });

      setCount(total);

      db,

      
  - ,

      `${currentUser.id}`,

      
  - 

    );

    const first = query(

      notificationsRef,

      where(
  - , 
  - , false),



      orderBy(
  - , 
  - ),

      limit(PAGE_SIZE)

    );



    const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(first, (querySnapshot) => {

      const notificationList = [];

      querySnapshot.forEach((doc) => {

        notificationList.push({

          ...doc.data(),

          key: doc.id,

        });

      });

      setNotifications(notificationList);

      setLastKey(querySnapshot.docs[querySnapshot.docs.length - 1]);

      setIsLoading(false);



      return () => {

        unsubscribe();

      };

    });

  }, [currentUser.id]);



  const loadMore = async () => {

    const notificationsRef = collection(

      db,

      
  - ,

      `${currentUser.id}`,

      
  - 

    );

    const nextQuery = query(

      notificationsRef,

      where(
  - , 
  - , false),

      orderBy(
  - , 
  - ),

      startAfter(lastKey),

      limit(PAGE_SIZE)

    );



    const nextNotificationList = [];

    const nextQuerySnapshot = await getDocs(nextQuery);

    const lastVisible =

      nextQuerySnapshot.docs[nextQuerySnapshot.docs.length - 1];



    nextQuerySnapshot.forEach((doc) => {

      nextNotificationList.push({

        ...doc.data(),

        key: doc.id,

      });

    });



    setNotifications([...notifications, ...nextNotificationList]);

    setLastKey(lastVisible);

  };



  const handleRead = (key) => {

    updateDoc(doc(db, 
  - , `${currentUser.id}`, 
  - , key), {

      is_read: true,

    })

      .then(() => {})

      .catch((error) => {

        console.log(
  - , error);

      });

  };



  const handleClickItem = (item) => {

    switch (item.type) {

      case 
  - :

        handleRead(item.key);

        nav(
  - );

        break;

      case 
  - :

        handleRead(item.key);

        nav(`/${ROUTES.JOB_SEEKER.DASHBOARD}/${ROUTES.JOB_SEEKER.MY_COMPANY}`);

        break;

      case 
  - :

        handleRead(item.key);

        nav(`/${ROUTES.JOB_SEEKER.DASHBOARD}/${ROUTES.JOB_SEEKER.MY_COMPANY}`);

        break;

      case 
  - :

        handleRead(item.key);

        nav(`/${ROUTES.JOB_SEEKER.DASHBOARD}/${ROUTES.JOB_SEEKER.MY_JOB}`);

        break;

      case 
  - :

        handleRead(item.key);

        nav(`/${ROUTES.EMPLOYER.PROFILE}`);

        break;

      case 
  - :

        handleRead(item.key);

        nav(`/${ROUTES.EMPLOYER.JOB_POST}`);

        break;

      case 
  - :

        handleRead(item.key);

        nav(

          `/${formatRoute(

            ROUTES.EMPLOYER.PROFILE_DETAIL,

            item[
  - ]?.resume_slug

          )}`

        );

        break;

      default:

        break;

    }

  };



  const handleRemove = (key) => {

    updateDoc(doc(db, 
  - , `${currentUser.id}`, 
  - , key), {

      is_deleted: true,

    })

      .then(() => {

        const index = notifications.findIndex((value) => value.key === key);

        if (index > -1) {

          let newNotifications = [...notifications];

          newNotifications.splice(index, 1);

          setNotifications(newNotifications);

        }

      })

      .catch((error) => {

        console.log(
  - , error);

      });

  };



  const handleRemoveAll = async () => {

    // Get a reference to the notifications collection

    const notificationsRef = collection(

      db,

      
  - ,

      `${currentUser.id}`,

      
  - 

    );

    const deleteQuery = query(

      notificationsRef,

      where(
  - , 
  - , false)

    );

    const querySnapshot = await getDocs(deleteQuery);



    // Create a batch write operation

    const batch = writeBatch(db);



    // Iterate over all documents and add them to the batch

    querySnapshot.forEach((doc) => {

      const docRef = doc.ref;

      batch.update(docRef, { is_deleted: true });

    });



    // Commit the batch write operation

    await batch.commit();

  };



  const handleMakeAllRead = async () => {

    // Get a reference to the notifications collection

    const notificationsRef = collection(

      db,

      
  - ,

      `${currentUser.id}`,

      
  - 

    );

    const readQuery = query(notificationsRef, where(
  - , 
  - , false));

    const querySnapshot = await getDocs(readQuery);



    // Create a batch write operation

    const batch = writeBatch(db);



    // Iterate over all documents and add them to the batch

    querySnapshot.forEach((doc) => {

      const docRef = doc.ref;

      batch.update(docRef, { is_read: true });

    });



    // Commit the batch write operation

    await batch.commit();

  };



  return (

    <Box>

      <Stack spacing={3}>

        <Stack

          direction={{

            xs: 
  - ,

            sm: 
  - ,

          }}

          justifyContent=
  - 

          alignItems={{

            xs: 
  - ,

            sm: 
  - ,

          }}

          spacing={2}

        >

          <Typography

            variant=
  - 

            sx={{ fontWeight: 600, color: 
  -  }}

          >

            {title}

          </Typography>

          <Stack direction=
  -  spacing={1}>

            {notifications.length > 0 && (

              <>

                <Button

                  variant=
  - 

                  size=
  - 

                  startIcon={<CheckCircleOutlineIcon />}

                  sx={{

                    textTransform: 
  - ,

                    borderRadius: 2,

                    
  - : {

                      backgroundColor: 
  - ,

                      color: 
  - ,

                    },

                  }}

                  onClick={handleMakeAllRead}

                >

                  Đánh dấu đã đọc

                </Button>



                <Button

                  color=
  - 

                  variant=
  - 

                  size=
  - 

                  startIcon={<DeleteOutlineIcon />}

                  sx={{

                    textTransform: 
  - ,

                    borderRadius: 2,

                    
  - : {

                      backgroundColor: 
  - ,

                      color: 
  - ,

                    },

                  }}

                  onClick={handleRemoveAll}

                >

                  Xóa tất cả

                </Button>

              </>

            )}

          </Stack>

        </Stack>



        <Divider sx={{ borderColor: 
  -  }} />



        <Box>

          {isLoading ? (

            <Stack justifyContent=
  -  direction=
  -  py={5}>

              <CircularProgress color=
  -  />

            </Stack>

          ) : notifications.length === 0 ? (

            <NoDataCard

              title=
  - 

              imgComponentSgv={<SVG_IMAGES.ImageSvg9 />}

            />

          ) : (

            <Stack spacing={2}>

              {notifications.map((value, index) => (

                <Box

                  key={value?.key}

                  sx={{

                    bgcolor: value?.is_read ? 
  -  : 
  - ,

                    borderRadius: 2,

                    transition: 
  - ,

                    // 
  - : {

                    //   bgcolor: 
  - ,

                    // }

                  <ListItem alignItems=
  -  sx={{ py: 2 }}>

                    <ListItemButton

                      onClick={() => handleClickItem(value)}

                          height={50}

import { Grid, Pagination, Stack } from 
  - ;

import { SVG_IMAGES, ROLES_NAME } from 
  - ;
import NoDataCard from 
  - ;
import jobService from 
  - ;
import JobPost from 
  - ;
import { useSelector } from 
  - ;

const SuggestedJobPostCard = ({ pageSize = 12, fullWidth = false }) => {
  const { currentUser, isAuthenticated } = useSelector((state) => state.user);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = React.useState(true);
  const [jobPosts, setJobPosts] = React.useState([]);
  const [page, setPage] = React.useState(1);
  const [count, setCount] = React.useState(0);
  const [parentWidth, setParentWidth] = React.useState(0);
  const [col, setCol] = React.useState(12);

  React.useEffect(() => {
    const handleResize = () => {
      const newWidth = document.getElementById(
        
  - 
      ).offsetWidth;
      setParentWidth(newWidth);
    };

    handleResize();

    window.addEventListener(
  - , handleResize);
    return () => window.removeEventListener(
  - , handleResize);
  }, []);

  React.useEffect(() => {
    if (parentWidth < 600) {
      setCol(12);
    } else if (parentWidth < 900) {
      setCol(6);
    } else if (parentWidth < 1200) {
      setCol(6);
    } else {
      setCol(4);
    }
  }, [parentWidth]);

  React.useEffect(() => {
    const getJobPosts = async () => {
      setIsLoading(true);
      try {
        const resData = await jobService.getSuggestedJobPosts({
          pageSize: pageSize,
          page: page,
        });
        const data = resData.data;

        setCount(data.count);
        setJobPosts(data.results);
      } catch (error) {
      } finally {
        setIsLoading(false);
      }
    };

    if (isAuthenticated && currentUser?.roleName === ROLES_NAME.JOB_SEEKER) {
      getJobPosts();
    } else {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  }, [page]);

  const handleChangePage = (event, newPage) => {
    setPage(newPage);
  };

  return (
    <div id=
  - >
      <Stack>
        {isLoading ? (
          <Grid container spacing={2}>
            {Array.from(Array(pageSize).keys()).map((item) => (
              <Grid key={item} item xs={col}>
                <JobPost.Loading></JobPost.Loading>
              </Grid>
            ))}
          </Grid>
        ) : jobPosts.length === 0 ? (
          <NoDataCard imgComponentSgv={<SVG_IMAGES.ImageSvg8 />} />
        ) : (
          <>
            <Grid container spacing={2}>
              {jobPosts.map((value) => (
                <Grid item xs={col} key={value.id}>
                  {/* Start: Job post */}
                  <JobPost
                    id={value.id}
                    slug={value.slug}
                    companyImageUrl={value?.companyDict?.companyImageUrl}
                    companyName={value?.companyDict?.companyName}
                    jobName={value?.jobName}
                    cityId={value?.locationDict?.city}
                    deadline={value?.deadline}
                    isUrgent={value?.isUrgent}
                    isHot={value?.isHot}
                    salaryMin={value.salaryMin}
                    salaryMax={value.salaryMax}
                  />
                  {/* End: Job post */}
                </Grid>
              ))}
            </Grid>
            <Stack sx={{mt: 4}}>
              {Math.ceil(count / pageSize) > 1 && (
                <Pagination
                  color=
  - 
                  size=
  - 
                  variant=
  - 
                  sx={{ margin:

  - ;

  - ;

  - ;

  {
    id: 
  - ,
    showOrder: false,
    numeric: false,
    disablePadding: true,
    label: 
  - ,
  },
  {

  - ,

const pageSize = 5;

const defaultFilterData = {
  cityId: 
  - ,
  careerId: 
  - ,
  experienceId: 
  - ,
  positionId: 
  - ,
  academicLevelId: 
  - ,
  typeOfWorkplaceId:

const AppliedResumeCard = ({ title }) => {
  const { allConfig } = useSelector((state) => state.config);
  const [openPopup, setOpenPopup] = React.useState(false);
  const [isSuccess, setIsSuccess] = React.useState(false);
  const [page, setPage] = React.useState(0);
  const [count, setCount] = React.useState(0);
  const [rowsPerPage, setRowsPerPage] = React.useState(pageSize);
  const [filterData, setFilterData] = React.useState(defaultFilterData);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = React.useState(true);
  const [isFullScreenLoading, setIsFullScreenLoading] = React.useState(false);
  const [jobPostOptions, setJobPostOptions] = React.useState([]);
  const [jobPostIdSelect, setJobPostIdSelect] = React.useState(
  - );
  const [applicationStatusSelect, setApplicationStatusSelect] =
    React.useState(
  - );
  const [resumes, retResumes] = React.useState([]);

  let numbersFilter = React.useMemo(() => {
    let count = 0;
    let keys = Object.keys(filterData);

    for (let i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
        if (
            keys[i] !== 
  -  &&
            keys[i] !== 
  -  &&
            filterData[keys[i]] !== 
  - 
        ) {
            count = count + 1;
        }
    }

    return count;
  }, [filterData]);

  React.useEffect(() => {
    const loadJobPostOptions = async (params) => {
      try {
        const resData = await jobService.getJobPostOptions(params);

        setJobPostOptions(Array.isArray(resData?.data) ? resData.data : []);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error(error);
      }
    };

    loadJobPostOptions();
  }, []);

  React.useEffect(() => {
    const loadJobPostActivity = async (params) => {
      setIsLoading(true);

      try {
        const resData = await jobPostActivityService.getAppliedResume(params);

        const data = resData?.data;
        const rawResumes = Array.isArray(data?.results)
          ? data.results
          : Array.isArray(data)
          ? data
          : [];

        setCount(typeof data?.count === 
  -  ? data.count : rawResumes.length);
        retResumes(rawResumes);
      } catch (error) {
        errorHandling(error);
      } finally {
        setIsLoading(false);
      }
    };

    loadJobPostActivity({
      page: page + 1,
      pageSize: rowsPerPage,
      ...filterData,
      jobPostId: jobPostIdSelect,
      status: applicationStatusSelect,
    });
  }, [
    page,
    rowsPerPage,
    filterData,
    jobPostIdSelect,
    applicationStatusSelect,
    isSuccess,
  ]);

  const handleFilter = (data) => {
    setOpenPopup(false);
    setFilterData({
      ...data,
      pageSize: pageSize,
    });
    setPage(0);
  };

  const handleExport = () => {
    const exportJobPostsActivity = async (params) => {
      setIsFullScreenLoading(true);

      try {
        const resData = await jobPostActivityService.exportAppliedResume(
          params
        );
        const data = resData.data;

        // export
        xlsxUtils.exportToXLSX(data, 
  - );
      } catch (error) {
        errorHandling(error);
      } finally {
        setIsFullScreenLoading(false);
      }
    };

    exportJobPostsActivity({
      page: page + 1,
      pageSize: rowsPerPage,
      ...filterData,
      jobPostId: jobPostIdSelect,
      status: applicationStatusSelect,
    });
  };

  const handleChangeApplicationStatus = (id, value, callback) => {
    const changeStatus = async (id, data) => {
      setIsFullScreenLoading(true);
      try {
        await jobPostActivityService.changeApplicationStatus(id, data);

        toastMessages.success(
  - );

        // success
        callback(true);
      } catch (error) {
        // Failed
        errorHandling(error);
        callback(false);
      } finally {
        setIsFullScreenLoading(false);
      }
    };
    changeStatus(id, { status: value });
  };

  const handleDelete = (id) => {
    const del = async (id) => {
      try {
        await jobPostActivityService.deleteJobPostActivity(id);
        setIsSuccess(!isSuccess);
        toastMessages.success(
  - );
      } catch (error) {
        errorHandling(error);
      } finally {
        setIsFullScreenLoading(false);
      }
    };

    confirmModal(
      () => del(id),
      
  - ,
      
  - ,
      
  - 
    );
  };

  const handleChangePage = (event, newPage) => {
    setPage(newPage);
  };

  const handleChangeRowsPerPage = (event) => {
    setRowsPerPage(parseInt(event.target.value, 10));
    setPage(0);
  };

  const handleResetFilterData = () => {
    setFilterData(defaultFilterData);
    setJobPostIdSelect(
  - );
    setApplicationStatusSelect(
  - );
  };

  return (
    <Box sx={{ 
      px: { xs: 1, sm: 2 }, 
      py: { xs: 2, sm: 2 }, 
      backgroundColor: 
  - , 
      borderRadius: 2 
    }}>
      {/* Header Section */}
      <Stack 
        direction={{ xs: 
  - , sm: 
  -  }}
        alignItems={{ xs: 
  - , sm: 
  -  }}
        justifyContent=
  - 
        spacing={{ xs: 2, sm: 0 }}
        mb={4}
      >
        <Typography 
          variant=
  -  
          sx={{ 
            fontWeight: 600,
            background: 
  - ,
            WebkitBackgroundClip: 
  - ,
            fontSize: { xs: 
  - , sm: 
  -  }
          }}
        >
          {title}
        </Typography>
        <Button
          variant=
  - 
          color=
  - 
          startIcon={<FileDownloadOutlinedIcon />}
          onClick={handleExport}
          sx={{
            borderRadius: 2,
            px: 3,
            width: { xs: 
  - , sm: 
  -  },
            
  - : {
              backgroundColor: 
  - 
            }
          }}
        >
          Tải danh sách
        </Button>
      </Stack>

      {/* Filter Section */}
      <Box sx={{ mb: 3 }}>
        <Typography 
          variant=
  -  
          sx={{ 
            color: 
  - ,
            fontWeight: 600,
            mb: 2
          }}
        >
          Bộ lọc:
        </Typography>

        <Grid container spacing={2}>
          <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={4} xl={5}>
            <Autocomplete
              getOptionLabel={(option) => option.jobName}
              value={jobPostOptions.find((o) => o.id === jobPostIdSelect) || null}
              onChange={(e, value) => setJobPostIdSelect(value?.id || 
  - )}
              disablePortal
              size=
  - 
              options={jobPostOptions}
              renderInput={(params) => (
                <TextField 
                  {...params} 
                  placeholder=
  - 
                  sx={{
                    
  - : {
                      borderRadius: 2,
                      backgroundColor: 
  - 
                    }
                  }}
                />
              )}
            />
          </Grid>
          <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={4} xl={3}>
            <Autocomplete
              getOptionLabel={(option) => option.name}
              value={
                allConfig?.applicationStatusOptions.find(
                  (o) => o.id === applicationStatusSelect
                ) || null
              }
              onChange={(e, value) => setApplicationStatusSelect(value?.id || 
  - )}
              disablePortal
              size=
  - 
              options={allConfig?.applicationStatusOptions || []}
              renderInput={(params) => (
                <TextField
                  {...params}
                  placeholder=
  - 
                  sx={{
                    
  - : {
                      borderRadius: 2,
                      backgroundColor: 
  - 
                    }
                  }}
                />
              )}
            />
          </Grid>
          <Grid item xs={12} sm={12} md={4}>
            <Stack
              direction=
  - 
              justifyContent={{ xs: 
  - , md: 
  -  }}
              spacing={1}
            >
              <Tooltip title=
  -  arrow>
                <IconButton 
                  onClick={handleResetFilterData}
                  sx={{
                    backgroundColor: 
  - ,
                    borderRadius: 2,
                    
  - : {
                      backgroundColor: 
  - 
                    }
                  }}
                >
                  <RefreshIcon />
                </IconButton>
              </Tooltip>
              <Button
                variant=
  - 
                color=
  - 
                startIcon={<FilterListIcon />}
                endIcon={<ExpandMoreIcon />}
                onClick={() => setOpenPopup(true)}
                sx={{
                  borderRadius: 2,
                  background: 
  - ,
                  boxShadow: 
  - ,
                  
  - : {
                    boxShadow: 
  - 
                  }
                }}
              >
                Lọc nâng cao ({numbersFilter})
              </Button>
            </Stack>
          </Grid>
        </Grid>
      </Box>

      {/* Loading Progress */}
      {isLoading ? (
        <Box sx={{ width: 
  - , mb: 2 }}>
          <LinearProgress 
            color=
  - 
            sx={{
              height: { xs: 4, sm: 6 },
              borderRadius: 3,
              backgroundColor: 
  - 
            }}
          />
        </Box>
      ) : (
        <Divider sx={{ mb: 2 }} />
      )}

      {/* Table Section */}
      <Box sx={{
        backgroundColor: 
  - ,
        borderRadius: 2,
        boxShadow: 
  - ,
        overflow: 
  - ,
        width: 
  - ,
        
  - : {
          overflowX: 
  - 
        }
      }}>
        <AppliedResumeTable
          headCells={headCells}
          rows={resumes}
          isLoading={isLoading}
          page={page}
          rowsPerPage={rowsPerPage}
          count={count}
          handleChangeApplicationStatus={handleChangeApplicationStatus}

  - ;

const SendEmailComponent = ({
  jobPostActivityId,
  isSentEmail,
  email,
  fullName,
}) => {
  const [isFullScreenLoading, setIsFullScreenLoading] = React.useState(false);
  const [openSendMailPopup, setOpenSendMailPopup] = React.useState(false);
  const [sendMailData, setSendMailData] = React.useState(null);
  const [sentEmail, setSentEmail] = React.useState(isSentEmail);

  const handleOpenSendMail = (email, fullName) => {
    setSendMailData({
      fullName: fullName,
      email: email,
    });
    setOpenSendMailPopup(true);
  };

  const handleSendEmail = (data) => {
    const sendEmail = async (id, data) => {
      setIsFullScreenLoading(true);
      try {
        await jobPostActivityService.sendEmail(id, data);

        if (!sentEmail) {
          setSentEmail(true);
        }
        setOpenSendMailPopup(false);
        toastMessages.success(
  - );
      } catch (error) {
        errorHandling(error);
      } finally {
        setIsFullScreenLoading(false);
      }
    };

    let newData = {
      ...data,
      content: convertEditorStateToHTMLString(data.content),
    };
    // execute
    sendEmail(jobPostActivityId, newData);
  };

  return (
    <>
      <Button
        variant=
  - 
        size=
  - 
        color=
  - 
        sx={{ textTransform: 
  - , width: 110 }}
        startIcon={
          sentEmail ? <MarkEmailReadRoundedIcon /> : <ForwardToInboxIcon />
        }
        onClick={() => handleOpenSendMail(email, fullName)}
      >
        {sentEmail ? 
  -  : 
  - }
      </Button>
      {/* Start: send mail */}
      <SendMailCard
        openPopup={openSendMailPopup}
        setOpenPopup={setOpenSendMailPopup}
        sendMailData={sendMailData}
        handleSendEmail={handleSendEmail}
      />
      {/* Start:  send mail */}
      {/* Start: full screen loading */}
      {isFullScreenLoading && <BackdropLoading />}
      {/* End: full screen loading */}
      </>
  );
};

const AppliedStatusComponent = ({
  options,
  defaultStatus,
  id,
  handleChangeApplicationStatus,
}) => {
  const { allConfig } = useSelector((state) => state.config);
  const [applyStatus, setApplyStatus] = React.useState(defaultStatus);

  const handleChangeValue = (e) => {
    const chooseValue = e.target.value;

    if (chooseValue < applyStatus) {
      errorModal(
        
  - ,
        `You are not allowed to change the application status from <strong style=
  - ${
          allConfig?.applicationStatusDict[applyStatus] || 
  - 
        }
  - ${
          allConfig?.applicationStatusDict[e.target.value] || 
  - 
        }
  - Update application status
  - ${
          allConfig?.applicationStatusDict[e.target.value] || 
  - 
        }
  - 
      );
    }
  };

  return (
    <TextField
      id=
  - 
      size=
  - 
      fullWidth
      select
      value={applyStatus}
      onChange={handleChangeValue}
    >
      {options.map((option) => (
        <MenuItem key={option.id} value={option.id}>
          {option.name}
        </MenuItem>
      ))}
    </TextField>
  );
};

const AIAnalysisComponent = ({ row }) => {
  const [status, setStatus] = React.useState(row.aiAnalysisStatus);
  const [score, setScore] = React.useState(row.aiAnalysisScore);

  const handleAnalyze = async () => {
    try {
      setStatus(
  - );
      await jobPostActivityService.analyzeResume(row.id);
      toastMessages.success(
  - );
    } catch (error) {
      errorHandling(error);
      setStatus(
  - );
    }
  };

  if (status === 
  - ) {
    return (
      <Tooltip
        title={
          <Box sx={{ p: 1 }}>
            <Typography variant=
  -  sx={{ fontWeight: 
  - , mb: 0.5 }}>
              AI Summary:
            </Typography>
            <Typography variant=
  - >{row.aiAnalysisSummary}</Typography>
            <Typography
              variant=
  - 
              sx={{ fontWeight: 
  - , mt: 1, mb: 0.5 }}
            >
              Skills:
            </Typography>
            <Typography variant=
  - >{row.aiAnalysisSkills || 
  - }</Typography>
          </Box>
        }
        arrow
      >
        <Chip
          icon={<PsychologyIcon />}
          label={`${score}%`}
          color={score >= 70 ? 
  -  : score >= 40 ? 
  -  : 
  - }
          size=
  - 
          onClick={handleAnalyze}
          sx={{ fontWeight: 
  -  }}
        />
      </Tooltip>
    );
  }

  if (status === 
  - ) {
    return (
      <Stack direction=
  -  spacing={1} alignItems=
  - >
        <CircularProgress size={16} />
        <Typography variant=
  - >Processing...</Typography>
      </Stack>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Button
      variant=
  - 
      size=
  - 
      startIcon={<AutoFixHighIcon />}
      onClick={handleAnalyze}
      sx={{ textTransform: 
  - , borderRadius: 1.5, fontSize: 
  - , py: 0.25 }}
    >
      Analyze
    </Button>
  );
};

  -

    dayjs(new Date()).subtract(1,

    dayjs(new Date()),

  ]);

    const statistics = async (data) => {

      setIsLoading(true);

      try {

        setData(resData.data);

  - , error);

      } finally {

        setIsLoading(false);

      }

  - ).toString(),

  - ).toString(),

  - ,

  - , // primary.main

  - ,

  -

  - ,

const CandidateChart = ({ title }) => {

  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = React.useState(true);

  const [allowSubmit, setAllowSubmit] = React.useState(false);

  const [selectedDateRange, setSelectedDateRange] = React.useState([

    dayjs(new Date()).subtract(1, 
  - ),

    dayjs(new Date()),

  ]);

  const [data, setData] = React.useState([]);



  React.useEffect(() => {

    const statistics = async (data) => {

      setIsLoading(true);

      try {

        const resData = await statisticService.employerCandidateStatistics(data);



        setData(resData.data);

      } catch (error) {

        console.error(
  - , error);

      } finally {

        setIsLoading(false);

      }

    };



    statistics({

      startDate: dayjs(selectedDateRange[0]).format(
  - ).toString(),

      endDate: dayjs(selectedDateRange[1]).format(
  - ).toString(),

    });



    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps

  }, [allowSubmit]);



  const dataOptions = React.useMemo(() => ({

    labels: data?.labels || [],

    datasets: [

      {

        label: data?.title1,

        data: data?.data1 || [],

        borderColor: 
  - , // theme.palette.secondary.main

        backgroundColor: 
  - ,

        borderWidth: 2,

        tension: 0.4,

        pointRadius: 4,

        pointHoverRadius: 6,

        pointBackgroundColor: 
  - ,

        pointHoverBackgroundColor: 
  - ,

        pointBorderWidth: 2,

        pointHoverBorderWidth: 2,

      },

      {

        label: data?.title2,

        data: data?.data2 || [],

        borderColor: 
  - , // theme.palette.primary.main

        backgroundColor: 
  - ,

        borderWidth: 2,

        tension: 0.4,

        pointRadius: 4,

        pointHoverRadius: 6,

        pointBackgroundColor: 
  - ,

        pointHoverBackgroundColor: 
  - ,

        pointBorderWidth: 2,

        pointHoverBorderWidth: 2,

      },

    ],

  }), [data]);



  return (

    <Card 

      sx={{ 

        p: 3,

        boxShadow: theme => theme.customShadows.card,

        border: theme => `1px solid ${theme.palette.grey[100]}`,

        height: 
  - 

      }}

    >

      <Stack spacing={3}>

        <Box>

          <Stack

            direction=
  - 

            justifyContent=
  - 

            alignItems=

import { Box, Button, Stack, Typography, Paper } from 
  - ;

import SaveOutlinedIcon from 
  - ;

import CameraAltOutlinedIcon from 
  - ;



import {

  convertEditorStateToHTMLString,

  createEditorStateFromHTMLString,

} from 
  - ;

import toastMessages from 
  - ;

import errorHandling from 
  - ;

import BackdropLoading from 
  - ;

import CompanyForm from 
  - ;

import companyService from 
  - ;

import MuiImageCustom from 
  - ;







const CompanyCard = () => {

  const [isSuccess, setIsSuccess] = React.useState(false);

  const [isLoadingCompany, setIsLoadingCompany] = React.useState(true);

  const [isFullScreenLoading, setIsFullScreenLoading] = React.useState(false);

  const [editData, setEditData] = React.useState(null);

  const [companyImageUrl, setCompanyImageUrl] = React.useState(null);

  const [companyCoverImageUrl, setCompanyCoverImageUrl] = React.useState(null);

  const [serverErrors, setServerErrors] = React.useState(null);

  const logoInputRef = React.useRef(null);
  const coverInputRef = React.useRef(null);


  React.useEffect(() => {

    const loadCompany = async () => {

      setIsLoadingCompany(true);

      try {

        const resData = await companyService.getCompany();

        var data = resData.data;



        data = {

          ...data,

          description: createEditorStateFromHTMLString(data?.description || 
  - ),

        };

        setEditData(data);



        if (companyImageUrl === null) {

          setCompanyImageUrl(data?.companyImageUrl);

        }

        if (companyCoverImageUrl === null) {

          setCompanyCoverImageUrl(data?.companyCoverImageUrl);

        }

      } catch (error) {

        errorHandling(error);

      } finally {

        setIsLoadingCompany(false);

      }

    };



    loadCompany();

    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps

  }, [isSuccess]);



  const handleUpdate = (data) => {

    const update = async (id, data) => {

      setIsFullScreenLoading(true);



      try {

        await companyService.updateCompany(id, data);



        setIsSuccess(!isSuccess);

        if (serverErrors !== null) setServerErrors(null);

        toastMessages.success(
  - );

      } catch (error) {

        errorHandling(error, setServerErrors);

      } finally {

        setIsFullScreenLoading(false);

      }

    };



    const dataCustom = {

      ...data,

      description: convertEditorStateToHTMLString(data.description),

    };



    update(dataCustom?.id, dataCustom);

  };



  const handleUpdateCompanyImageUrl = (file) => {

        const update = async (formData) => {

      setIsFullScreenLoading(true);

      try {

        const resData = await companyService.updateCompanyImageUrl(formData);

        const data = resData.data;



        toastMessages.success(
  - );

        setCompanyImageUrl(data?.companyImageUrl);

      } catch (error) {

        errorHandling(error);

      } finally {

        setIsFullScreenLoading(false);

      }

    };



    var formData = new FormData();

    formData.append(
  - , file);

    update(formData);

  };



  const handleUpdateCompanyCoverImageUrl = (file) => {

    

    const update = async (formData) => {

      setIsFullScreenLoading(true);

      try {

        const resData = await companyService.updateCompanyCoverImageUrl(

          formData

        );

        const data = resData.data;



        toastMessages.success(
  - );

        setCompanyCoverImageUrl(data?.companyCoverImageUrl);

      } catch (error) {

        errorHandling(error);

      } finally {

        setIsFullScreenLoading(false);

      }

    };



    var formData = new FormData();

    formData.append(
  - , file);

    update(formData);

  };



  return (

    <Paper elevation={0}>

      <Stack spacing={4}>

        <Box>

          <Typography

            variant=
  - 

            sx={{

              mb: 2,

              fontWeight: 600,

              color: 
  - ,

            }}

          >

            Logo công ty

          </Typography>

          <Box sx={{ position: 
  -  }}>

            <MuiImageCustom

              src={companyImageUrl}

              width={120}

              height={120}

              sx={{

                borderRadius: 2,

                border: (theme) => `1px solid ${theme.palette.grey[200]}`,

                boxShadow: (theme) => theme.customShadows.small,

              }}

            />

            <Box sx={{ mt: 2 }}>

              <Button
                variant=
  - 
                size=
  - 
                startIcon={<CameraAltOutlinedIcon />}
                onClick={() => logoInputRef.current?.click()}
                sx={{
                  borderRadius: 2,
                  textTransform: 
  - ,
                  boxShadow: 
  - ,
                }}
              >
                Thay logo
              </Button>
            </Box>

          </Box>

        </Box>



        <Box>

          <Typography

            variant=
  - 

            sx={{

              mb: 2,

              fontWeight: 600,

              color: 
  - ,

            }}

          >

            Ảnh bìa công ty

          </Typography>

          <Box sx={{ position: 
  -  }}>

            <MuiImageCustom

              src={companyCoverImageUrl}

              height={160}

              width=
  - 

              sx={{

                borderRadius: 2,

                border: (theme) => `1px solid ${theme.palette.grey[200]}`,

                boxShadow: (theme) => theme.customShadows.small,

              }}

              fit=
  -

            <Box sx={{ mt: 2 }}>

import { useSelector } from 
  - ;

import { useForm, useWatch } from 
  - ;

import { yupResolver } from 
  - ;

import * as yup from 
  - ;

import { Grid, Skeleton } from 
  - ;



import errorHandling from 
  - ;

import { REGEX_VATIDATE } from 
  - ;

  - ;

  - ;

  - ;

  - ;

  - ;
